title: Video Editor
description:
I run multiple Shopify brands and spend daily on Meta Ads. I need a video editor who can turn around ad creatives fast and consistently.

What you'll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads — UGC-style, AI UGC (HeyGen/ElevenLabs), VSLs, Frankenstein-style mashups, static-to-video. You'll get scripts, assets, and briefs. You send back scroll-stopping ads.

What I'm looking for:

— You've edited DTC/e-commerce ads before (show me)

— You know what makes someone stop scrolling

— You can handle volume — we test a lot of creatives

— You're reliable. Deadlines aren't suggestions

— You're comfortable with CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci — whatever gets it done

— Bonus if you've worked with HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar AI tools

What you get:

— Consistent work, not a one-off gig

— Fair pay, paid on time, every time

— A founder who actually gives clear briefs and feedback

— Room to grow if you're good

How to apply:

Send me 2-3 of your best ad edits (DTC preferred) and a short message about your experience. No cover letter novels. Just show me what you can do.

title: Remote Paid Ads Role
description:
If you’ve only watched courses and never managed real campaigns — skip this.



We’re looking for someone who has actually spent time inside Google Ads, made mistakes, tested things, and understands what performance means.



What you’ll be doing

Work directly on live campaigns (not demo accounts)

Optimize based on data, not guesswork

Adjust targeting, creatives, and structure when performance drops

Scale campaigns that are already working

You’ll fit if

You have at least 6 months running Google Ads hands-on

You know what CPC, CPA, ROAS actually mean in practice

You’ve tested things yourself (and seen both wins and losses)

You don’t need to be told every single step

You won’t fit if

You only know theory

You’ve never handled real budget

You rely on “copy paste strategy” without understanding

Real campaigns, real data, real responsibility

No micromanagement

Flexible remote work

A chance to actually get better at performance marketing

title: Part-Time Content Writer
description:
We're looking for a part-time content writer who can help us create high-quality, valuable blog content for multiple projects. We're looking for someone who isn't completely reliant on AI, can take instructions, and deliver without requiring constant handholding.



What You'll Be Doing:



- Researching and writing high-quality blog posts across multiple niches

- Creating engaging, valuable content that serves real readers, not just search engines

- Following detailed briefs and content guidelines without needing them over-explained

- Helping out with general content-related tasks as needed across projects



Our Approach:



We don't do cookie-cutter content here. We think carefully about what actually makes a piece of writing useful, interesting, and worth reading, and we're always refining our process. As part of the team, you'll be exposed to content strategies and writing techniques that may challenge what you think you know. 



We value writers who can bring their own voice and judgment to the table, while also being open to direction and honest feedback. If you're told something needs to change, we expect it to change.



You're a Great Fit If You:



- Can write well without leaning heavily on AI tools to do the thinking for you

- Know how to follow a brief and deliver what's actually asked for

- Like to think critically and aren't afraid of unfamiliar topics or new ideas

- Can take constructive feedback and apply it without taking it personally

- Are reliable, organized, and respect deadlines

title: Content Creation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Content Creation Specialist (GovCon iSource)

Company: Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC)

Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM CST, flexible



About Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC)

Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC) is a high-impact government contracting consulting firm dedicated to helping small businesses build, grow, and scale by becoming fully contract-ready. Through our programs, services, and SaaS platform GovCon iSource, we provide the strategy, tools, and execution needed for businesses to secure government contracts and maximize their growth potential.

Our clients are U.S.-based small business owners generating $100K to $10M annually, seeking structure, strategy, and results in their government contracting journey. Content is a core vehicle for engagement, education, and authority-building—this role drives that mission.





Role Overview

We are seeking a Content Creation Specialist to serve as the strategic engine behind all TIKC content, ensuring every video, graphic, blog, and newsletter reflects clarity, authority, and impact.



This role manages end-to-end content production, including creation, editing, approvals, and scheduling. You’ll coordinate closely with the team, including videographers and automation specialists, to ensure content resonates with our small business audience and positions TIKC as the go-to GovCon authority.



You will own quality, consistency, and efficiency, balancing creativity with operational precision. Your work directly impacts brand authority, client engagement, lead generation, and program adoption.



Key Responsibilities

- Video Editing & Coordination

- Review and edit videos produced by tea
mbers (e.g., Rohit), correcting grammar, clarity, and flow

- Provide feedback and coordinate revisions with the videographer

- Conduct huddles if clarifications are needed after multiple edits

- Ensure all video content is polished, accurate, and on-brand before publishing



Monthly Newsletter Production

- Develop monthly themes aligned with marketing priorities and promotions

- Research and write blog articles for the newsletter

- Design supporting graphics (Hero graphics, blog tiles, promo graphics, thumbnails)

- Create captions, subtexts, and SEO-optimized copy for graphics

- Ensure all links are functional and campaigns are replicated on the website

- Maintain blog thumbnails and graphics for consistency and brand integrity



News & Updates

- Research and curate relevant news for the GovCon industry

- Design graphics and write captions for news posts

- Coordinate approval processes with internal stakeholders

- Schedule news content across platforms



Content Production & Platform Management

- Research trending topics and relevant themes for small business GovCon clients

- Produce all necessary assets (graphics, reels, static posts, etc.)

- Write platform-appropriate captions, including SEO optimization

- Obtain approvals for all assets before scheduling

- Schedule content consistently across platforms to maximize engagement



Required Qualifications

- Proven experience in content creation, video editing, and digital marketing

- Skilled in graphic design and video editing tools

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Experience managing newsletters, blogs, and social media platforms

- Ability to multitask and manage multiple projects with attention to detail

- Proactive, results-driven, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment



Preferred Qualifications

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar marketing automation platforms

- Knowledge of SEO, captioning, and digital content optimization

- Experience creating content for small business or B2B audiences

- Understanding of GovCon industry, federal/state contracting, and small business operations



Ideal Candidate Traits

- Creative yet detail-oriented

- Strong sense of ownership and accountability

- Results-driven with the ability to hit deadlines consistently

- Collaborative, adaptable, and able to communicate clearly with multiple stakeholders

- Comfortable leading content discussions and providing strategic input



Why This Role Matters

The Content Creation Specialist ensures that TIKC’s brand, expertise, and client engagement are consistently elevated through high-quality, accurate, and impactful content. By producing polished videos, graphics, newsletters, blogs, and automation-ready campaigns, this role transforms raw ideas into structured, engaging, and revenue-generating content, directly influencing:

- Client engagement and program adoption

- Lead generation and conversion

- Brand authority and marketplace positioning

- Internal efficiency and content strategy execution



---------

How to Apply



If you’re ready to bring structure, strategy, and results-driven client success to a fast-growing GovCon ecosystem:



Apply here:

title: Graphic Designer – Brand Kit & Print Marketing Template
description:
Overview

- We are launching a new direct marketing company focused on distributing monthly printed leaflets to households. These leaflets will promote local businesses, featuring special offers, discounts, and coupons.

- We are seeking a talented and reliable graphic designer to help bring this concept to life through a cohesive brand identity and practical, print-ready templates.



Scope of Work

Phase 1: Brand Kit Development

- Logo design (primary and variations)

- Colour palette

- Typography selection

- Brand guidelines (simple usage guide)

- Visual style direction (modern, clean, and suitable for local advertising)



Phase 2: Leaflet Template Design

- Design a reusable, print-ready leaflet template

- Layout must accommodate multiple advertisers per page

- Clear sections for:

- Business ads

- Offers/coupons

- Contact details

- Easy-to-use structure so new artwork can be dropped in each month

- Optimised for print (bleed, margins, high resolution, etc.)

- File formats suitable for editing (e.g. Adobe InDesign, Canva, or similar)



Deliverables

- Complete brand kit package

- Editable leaflet template file(s)

- Print-ready PDF example

- Basic instructions or guidance on how to update the template



Ideal Candidate

- Strong graphic design portfolio (branding + print work essential)

- Experience designing for print marketing materials

- Proficiency in tools such as Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, or Canva

- Ability to create clean, commercially effective layouts

- Good communication and ability to meet deadlines



Future Opportunity

- This is an initial project, but there is strong potential for ongoing monthly work, including:

- Updating leaflet editions

- Creating additional marketing materials

- Supporting the growth of the brand

title: Software QA Tester
description:
As a quality assurance professional the QA Engineer combines strategic manual testing with automated test development to ensure comprehensive quality coverage for desktop and mobile applications, driving modern testing practices that integrate seamlessly with CI/CD pipelines. Our code base is predominately PHP backend API with a React UI. 



• Design and implement automated end-to-end test scripts using Playwright for both desktop and mobile applications

• Review and validate developer unit tests to ensure comprehensive test coverage and quality standards

• Create and maintain automated test suites that integrate with CI/CD pipelines for continuous quality assurance

• Perform strategic manual testing for complex scenarios while identifying opportunities for test automation

• Convert existing manual test cases into automated scripts to improve testing efficiency and reliability

• Collaborate with development teams to establish testing best practices and quality gates in the development process

• Participate in SCRUM ceremonies including sprint planning, story point estimation, and technical testing discussions

• Work across multiple squads to implement consistent automated testing standards and practices

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN END-TO-END ECOMMERCE OPERATIONS



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–5 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdK1SHQ9UNeQq98nRv_IetlncCT1GozUDZ8RnMbYB9de6pbHg/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=

title: Copywriter
description:
We are a New Zealand-based company with a global client base. We are looking for an exceptional copywriter who can produce sophisticated, research-backed, long-form and short-form content across a wide range of industries. Our work spans SEO-driven articles, technical deep dives, thought leadership, PR-focused content, and brand website copy.



The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker who writes with clarity, authority, and nuance. We are keen to work with someone who understands how to translate complex information into compelling and engaging content after doing comprehensive research on required topics, and has a strong attention to detail. 



Long-Form Content & SEO

- Write in-depth SEO articles (1,500–3,000+ words) optimized around keyword intent, search psychology, and structured readability.

- Create expert-level content across a variety of verticals, including technology, education, AI, HR/payroll, engineering, beauty science, wellness, hospitality, and more.

- Develop high-quality guest posts and editorial pieces suitable for authoritative publications.



Brand & Website Copy

- Produce persuasive landing pages, service descriptions, and product messaging across B2B and B2C brands.

- Adapt tone and voice for industries ranging from heavy technical sectors to luxury, wellness, and lifestyle.



Research & Analysis



- Convert technical, scientific, or regulatory documents into reader-friendly copy without losing accuracy.

- Conduct competitive, topical, and keyword research to inform content architecture.

- Synthesize multiple sources into cohesive and well-structured narratives.



Who You Are / Required Skills



- Exceptional written English with a confident, polished, and authoritative voice.

- Strong experience with long-form, research-heavy content.

- Ability to write for different tones: technical, scientific, editorial, luxury, corporate, conversational, and educational.

- Skilled in SEO fundamentals, keyword strategy, and content structure.

- Comfortable interpreting technical papers, product documentation, or complex subject matter.

- Writes clean, publication-ready copy with minimal revision needed.



Please send:



1. 3–5 writing samples (preferably long-form or technically detailed pieces).

2. A short introduction about your background and writing strengths.

3. Include this note in your application "I acknowledge this position is a full-time, long-term role. I will be working exclusively with one employer, will not engage in job hopping or moonlighting, and I understand time tracking tools are used in this role."





Note:

1. We value loyalty and don't want to work with people who like to engage in job hopping in short time spans. We want to hire, train, and retain talent that values long-term relationships and wants to grow with us. If you're after a short-term gig, please don't apply. Candidates who have a history of bulk applying for jobs or quickly jumping between jobs will be rejected.

2. We use Time Doctor as a tracking tool.

3. The working hours are 9am - 5pm, Philippines time, while being fully remote.

4. You need a stable high-speed internet connection and your own device.

5. Salary offered will depend on experience level

title: Program & Project Manager
description:
Program & Project Manager 



About Us:



EVORETRO is a fast-growing international brand specializing in protective and display solutions for collectibles (trading cards, graded cards, figures, and more).



We operate across multiple product lines, global markets, and cross-functional teams — managing product launches, marketing campaigns, and operational initiatives simultaneously.



We are looking for a high-performance operator who can drive execution while aligning teams with company strategy.



 Role Mission:



•Ensure the company is working on the right priorities and that everything gets executed on time, at high quality, and with full accountability.

•You will act as the bridge between leadership and execution, working directly with the COO and department heads to drive results across the organization.



 Key Responsibilities

1. Company-Wide Project & Execution Management

•Own and maintain a master tracker of all company initiatives

•Track:rojects, tasks, deadlines, and dependencies

•Ensure every initiative has: Clear owner , Defined deadline,Measurable outcome

•Drive projects from planning ? execution ? completion



2. Cross-Department Alignment

•Act as the central point of contact (POC) across departments

•Ensure all teams are aligned with:

-Company priorities

-Strategic goals

•Coordinate between marketing, operations, product, and leadership

•Resolve misalignment and communication gaps



3. Team Accountability & Execution Control

•Hold tea
mbers and department leads accountable for deliverables

•Conduct regular follow-ups (daily/weekly)

•Challenge delays, vague updates, and low-quality work

•Push for:

-Clarity

-Speed

-Results



4. Strategic Planning & Translation

•Work with leadership to translate company strategy into execution plans

•Break down high-level goals into:

-Actionable tasks

-Department-level initiatives

-Ensure priorities are realistic and properly resourced



5. Executive Reporting & Visibility

•Provide structured reports to leadership:

-On track / At risk / Delayed

-Key blockers and risks

•Deliver clear, actionable insights (not just updates)

•Ensure full visibility across all major initiatives



6. Quality Control & Delivery Standards

-Review key deliverables before reaching leadership

•Ensure work is:

-Complete

-Accurate

-High quality

-Reject or return substandard work

•Maintain a high-performance execution culture



7. Process Improvement & Systems

•Build and optimize workflows, SOPs, and operational systems

•Implement and enforce tools (Asana, dashboards, trackers)

•Identify inefficiencies and eliminate bottlenecks

•Standardize processes across teams



8. Risk, Bottleneck & Resource Management

•Identify risks, delays, and operational gaps early

•Proactively solve issues to maintain timelines

•Coordinate resources across teams to avoid conflicts

•Escalate critical issues when needed



•Ideal Candidate Must-Have:

-3–5+ years experience in:

•Project Management / Program Management / Operations

•Experience managing cross-functional teams

•Strong execution and follow-up skills

•Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Excellent communication (English required)



Core Strengths:

•Execution-driven — gets things done

•Strategic thinker — understands priorities and big picture

•High accountability mindset — does not let things slip

•Strong communicator — can work with executives and operators

•Systems-oriented — loves structure, tracking, and optimization



Personality Fit:

•Proactive and results-driven

•Comfortable pushing people and asking tough questions

•High standards — does not accept “half-done” work

•Calm under pressure and able to manage complexity



Bonus:

•Experience with Asana or similar tools

•Experience in e-commerce / Amazon / product-based business

•Experience working with remote/international teams

•PMP, Agile, or similar certifications



•KPIs (Success Metrics)

-% of projects delivered on time

-Cross-department alignment score

-Reduction in delays and bottlenecks

-Project completion rate

-Quality of deliverables (rework reduction)

-Operational efficiency improvements

-Executive visibility & reporting clarity



Why Join EVORETRO

•High-impact role working directly with leadership

•Opportunity to shape company operations and execution

•Fast-growing international brand

title: OTR Fleet Team Member
description:

GOZAL INC – Remote (Philippines)



GOZAL INC is a growing U.S.-based trucking company seeking an experienced Fleet Operations Virtual Assistant located in the Philippines to support our fleet management and maintenance coordination.



This role is ideal for someone who has previously worked with U.S. trucking companies, dispatch teams, or fleet maintenance operations. The position focuses on coordinating repairs, communicating with service providers, tracking maintenance issues, and assisting the operations team with fleet-related tasks.



Responsibilities



Assist with coordinating truck and trailer repairs with repair shops and roadside service providers across the U.S.



Research and locate repair facilities when drivers experience breakdowns



Communicate with repair shops to request quotes and negotiate service pricing when possible



Track maintenance issues and update fleet records



Assist drivers and dispatch with repair updates and service scheduling



Maintain organized records of repairs, invoices, and maintenance history



Help ensure fleet equipment is repaired quickly and efficiently



Support the operations team with fleet-related administrative tasks



Requirements



Previous experience working with a U.S. trucking company or fleet operations team



Experience assisting with fleet maintenance coordination, roadside service, or dispatch support



Strong written and spoken English



Strong communication skills when dealing with repair shops and vendors



Reliable internet connection



Ability to work during U.S. business hours when required



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Experience using Google Sheets / spreadsheets



Preferred Experience



Experience working with dispatch or maintenance departments



Familiarity with trucking terminology (tractor, trailer, breakdowns, road service)



Experience supporting U.S.-based trucking companies remotely



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary based on experience.



Application Instructions



To confirm that you read the full job description, please include the word “Turbo” at the end of your application message.



Applications that do not include this word may not be reviewed.

description:
Remote Videographer / Video Editor



We’re looking for a skilled videographer + video editor to support content creation for a growing brand.



Scope of Work:



* Edit short-form and long-form videos (social media, ads, content)

* Work with raw footage and turn it into engaging content

* Add captions, transitions, music, and basic effects

* Follow brand style and improve content quality

* (Optional) Help guide shooting style or give input on footage



Requirements:



* Strong video editing skills (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.)

* Experience with social media content (TikTok, IG, YouTube)

* Good sense of pacing, storytelling, and visuals

* Reliable and responsive

* Portfolio required



Setup:



* Remote / freelance

* Flexible hours

* Ongoing work for the right person



Budget:



* To be discussed (per project or monthly)



To Apply:

Send:



* Portfolio / sample work

* Your rates

* Short intro about your experience

title: OPERATIONS & GROWTH ASSISTANT
description:
Are you looking for a career instead of just another freelance gig?



Residentas is a fast-growing short-term rental company with premium

properties in Lisbon, Portugal and the United States. We are not just

hiring a Virtual Assistant -- we are looking for a long-term tea
mber

who wants to grow with us.



As our Operations & Growth Assistant, you will work directly with our

team to help us make smarter decisions through data, keep our properties

performing at their best, and build the systems that scale with us.



This is a stepping stone into the cutting-edge world of short-term

rentals and hospitality operations.



We have high standards and a low tolerance for "good enough."

If that excites you rather than scares you, keep reading.



---



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

+ Pulling and analyzing booking data across our properties

+ Building and maintaining weekly performance reports

+ Tracking key metrics: occupancy, revenue, cancellations, reviews

+ Researching upsell opportunities like early check-ins and add-ons

+ Optimizing listings on Airbnb and 

+ Competitor research and market analysis

+ Spotting trends and flagging problems before they become urgent



---



QUALITIES WE VALUE:

1. Integrity -- be honest, especially when things go wrong

2. Curiosity -- you ask "what does this mean?" not just "what do I do?"

3. Commitment -- we want someone building a future, not filling a gap

4. Desire to Learn -- we provide the training, you provide the drive



---



REQUIREMENTS:

+ Excellent written and verbal English (non-negotiable)

+ Comfortable with Google Sheets or Excel (formulas, pivot tables)

+ Tech-savvy: MS Office, ChatGPT, project management tools

+ Detail-oriented and able to work independently

+ Stable internet connection and reliable home setup

+ Full-time availability (40 hours/week, exclusively)



---



THE BENEFITS:

+ Starting pay: PHP 30,000/month with room to grow

+ Performance-based raises

+ 100% remote

+ Small team -- your work is visible and your impact is real

+ Direct involvement with an international brand



---



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs

2. Include the code OG2 at the end of your subject line

3. I will send you a link to our official application form

4. On the form, in the extra comments section, write SM4



We read every message. If you are the right person, we will move fast.



-- The Residentas Team

title: Software Tutorial Creator - YouTube Channels (WFH, Apply via Google Form)
description:
We run multiple YouTube channels that publish step-by-step software tutorials.



What you'll actually do:



- We give you a software and a topic

- Our AI tool gives you a rough set of steps to start with

- You open the software, go through those steps, and check if they're correct

- If the AI got something wrong (this happens often), you find the correct steps by researching a bit (Most important part)

- You write steps of what you did (example: "clicked Settings, then Billing, then Add Payment Method"). Nothing fancy, just   what you clicked and where. Our tool turns these into a full script automatically.

- You then record your screen following the final process (no voice-over needed)



The key skill we're hiring for:



- The AI gives you a starting point, but it's not always right. You need to be someone who can research and update steps when its wrong, explore the software, and figure out the correct way on your own.





What we need from you:



- Good English, both reading and writing. You'll receive instructions and communicate in English daily. If there's a language gap, it creates problems. This is the most important requirement.

- Comfortable figuring out new software. You'll work on different software every week (project management tools, website builders, CRM platforms, etc.). You don't need to know them beforehand, but you should be someone who picks things up quickly on a computer.

- Two-monitor setup, or willingness to arrange one before starting.

- Screen recording software (OBS, Loom, or similar).

- Reliable internet.



What you DON'T need:



- No speaking or voice-over

- No video editing

- No scriptwriting (our tools handle that)





HOW TO APPLY:



Do NOT use the Apply button on this page.



Fill out this Google Form instead: 
  



Incase link ain't working for you, please D
.

title: Web & Ecommerce Manager (SEO & Content)
description:
Job Title: Web & Ecommerce Manager (SEO & Content)



We are looking for a hands-on Web & Ecommerce Manager to manage our websites, product listings, content updates, and ongoing website improvements.



This role is ideal for someone who can handle website admin, product uploads, SEO, content writing, design updates, and general website management in one position. You will also assist with new website builds for our own businesses and client projects when required.



Key responsibilities

Manage and maintain company websites

Upload and update products accurately

Write clear, SEO-friendly product descriptions

Complete meta titles, meta descriptions, headings, alt text, and internal links

Apply best-practice on-page SEO when adding products and pages

Check websites for errors, broken links, layout issues, and outdated content

Update images, collections, categories, and page content

Assist with landing pages, website improvements, and new website projects

Help keep all websites organised, professional, and up to date

Skills and experience

Experience with website admin and ecommerce product uploads

Strong writing skills for product descriptions and website content

Good understanding of SEO and metadata

Experience with Shopify, WordPress, or similar platforms

Good eye for layout, presentation, and detail

Ability to work independently and take initiative

What we want



We need someone who does more than just upload products. When a product is added, it should be done properly from the start — with the description, SEO, metadata, images, links, and layout all completed correctly.



To apply



Please send your resume, examples of websites or product pages you’ve worked on, and a short note about your experience with ecommerce and SEO.

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer (Figma, Remote)
description:
Hi everyone,



My name is Dr Louise Rix. I run an online education and content business focused on digital health, clinical product, and healthtech.



You can learn more here: 
 and 
/in/louiserix



I am looking for a part-time Graphic Designer to support me with creating high-quality visual content, for social media, mainly for LinkedIn.



This is a long-term role, starting part-time, with the possibility of more hours in the future as the business grows.



You will be working directly with me to create clean, professional infographics, carousels and educational graphics.



This is the first hire for my remote team, so I am looking for someone reliable who wants to grow with the business over time.



About the work



Most of the work will involve designing:



Infographics

Carousels

Cheat sheets

Diagrams

Educational graphics

Slides / PDFs

Visual layouts for online courses



The style should be:



clean

modern

professional

minimal

easy to read

high quality



Most content will be created in Figma.



In the future, the role may include designing for Instagram or course content, but the main focus is LinkedIn.



About Louise



- Medical doctor working in digital health and healthtech

- Former venture capitalist and startup founder

- Writes online and runs courses about clinical product and healthcare innovation

- Building a personal brand and online education business

- Works to a high standard and values professionalism and attention to detail



Key & Essential Skills



Strong written English communication skills

Strong design skills

Experience using Figma is a must

Good eye for layout, typography and spacing

Ability to create clean, professional graphics

Very strong attention to detail

Positive “can do” attitude and willingness to take on tasks or any size and learn new things!

Willing to work hard and want to grow professionally



If the candidate is successful, there will be opportunities for pay rises and bonuses depending on performance.



Bonus (not required)



The following are nice to have but a positive mindset and willingness to learn are more important:



Experience with LinkedIn content

Experience with Instagram or other social media platforms

Experience repurposing content across platforms



Hours & Schedule



- Part-time role (10–15 hours per week to start)

- You must be available every weekday from 7–9am UK time for live collaboration and training. Please note British Summer Time starts on 29th March so ensure you can do these hours.

- Remaining hours are flexible

- This schedule works well for candidates based in the Philippines

- Flexible vacation time. If you need time off just book it off a week in advance.



There may be more hours available in the future as the business grows.



Pay



- Up to $5 per hour depending on experience

- This is a long-term role with the option to become full-time later in the year

- Opportunity for pay rises and bonuses as responsibility increases



Applying for the job



Please apply in the following format:

- Subject [Your name] Part-Time Graphic Designer (Figma, Remote)

- Write 3-5 sentences about why you would like this position and why you are a good fit.

- Focus on education, work experience and any written or creative work you have done before

- Under that put the following, and include the letters to make it easy for me to read:

- Numbers of years experience helping with written English

- What software you have used for

- What software you use for design work



Please include your CV and creative portfolio



Make sure you follow these steps as we often receive a lot of applications and being organised is critical. We are looking for a tea
mber for the long term and will offer raises and bonus’ based on performance as we grow our company and you progress. Therefore, I will only look at applicants that really want the role.



If you are invited to the interview stage, there will be a written and creative task that will be paid.



If successful at this stage, there will be a short video call between us and video and spoken English will be required. Don’t worry if you are shy, I can be too!



Thank you for reading the application



Dr. Louise Rix

title: $800 - Video Editor - YouTube
description:
I run a fast-growing media group managing 10+ Long-Form YouTube channels (Finance, Psychology, Space, Strategy, Urbanism, Business).



I am looking for a creative partner to handle the production across multiple niches. You won't just "cut" videos; you will give life to complex scripts using a mix of AI-generated visuals, stock footage, and high-end sound design.



Your Mission:



Versatility: Adapt your editing style to the specific DNA of each channel (from dark financial thrillers to minimalist psychological essays).



AI Integration: Work seamlessly with AI-generated assets (Images/Videos) provided by me.



Immersive Sound Design: Create audio landscapes that match the intellectual depth of the scripts.



Graphic Identity: Design elegant motion graphics and titles.



Requirements:



Fluency in English is mandatory. You must understand complex scripts to ensure visual pacing matches the intellectual depth of the voice-over.



Advanced Skills with editing: Premiere Pro, After Effects, or DaVinci Resolve.



Aesthetic Sensitivity: Experience with "Video Essay" formats, documentary styles, and "Liminal Spaces" aesthetics is a huge plus.



Reliability: This is a long-term position. I need consistent updates and respected deadlines.



Trial: Candidates will be tested on a 60-second sequence. If the test is successful, you will be hired to complete the full video, and the entire project (including the trial) will be paid. This ensures we only pay for work that meets our professional standards.



IMPORTANT: To prove you have read this entire offer, start your message with the word: "Video". Also, please include a link to your portfolio/reel focusing on storytelling or documentary-style edits.

title: AI Video Creator — Wellness Reels with Realistic Hooks + Talking Head Avatar
description:
We run a US health & wellness brand and need short-form video content (20–90 sec) for
 and Instagram.



We need two types of videos:



TYPE 1 — AI Hook Videos

Realistic before-images of body problem areas (belly, legs, arms, skin) paired with text overlays. These are used as scroll-stopping hooks. Must look authentic, not stock-photo.



TYPE 2 — Talking Head Videos

AI-generated Black male or female persona, 50–60 years old, professional setting (office/desk, warm light). Clean suit or smart casual. Speaks directly to camera. High realism — similar to HeyGen Studio quality.



Both types are combined into one short reel with captions (white text, black outline, key words highlighted in cyan).



WHAT YOU DELIVER:

- 1 finished reel per day (20–90 seconds)



TOOLS: HeyGen, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar — your choice.

Scripts and creative brief provided via AI template (Claude).



TO APPLY: Send examples of AI avatar videos and/or realistic body hook content you have created before and tell how much you charge per video. (we dont provide ai tools)

title: Customer Service Representative at Spectre Ventures
description:
Good day! If you’re passionate about delivering top-notch customer service and excited to make a real difference in a dynamic company, we’d love to hear from you! Spectre Ventures is on the hunt for a part-time Customer Service Representative to support the growth of our online businesses, including eCommerce brands and content websites.



What You Will Do:

As a Customer Service Representative at Spectre Ventures, you’ll:

- Provide excellent customer service across multiple brands to boost satisfaction and loyalty.

- Handle customer inquiries efficiently on Zendesk, managing at least 40 tickets daily with an 85% CSAT score, under 5-minute First Response Time, and under 24-hour Resolution Time.

- Assist potential customers with pre-sale questions and support existing ones by solving issues, giving order updates, and encouraging reviews after great experiences.

- Take care of admin tasks like order logging, problem screening, processing returns, data entry, and issuing replacements or refunds as needed.

- Perform basic Shopify duties, including order fulfillment, cancellations, edits, refunds, invoice creation, and discount code generation.

- Suggest ideas to improve the efficiency and consistency of our customer service processes.



Our Ideal Candidate:

- Brings 3+ years of e-commerce customer service experience via phone and
.

- Is skilled in using Zendesk and Shopify.

- Has strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Knows how to use G-Suite tools (Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Meet).

- Shows empathy and understanding toward customers while balancing business needs.

- Is a dedicated problem solver who loves helping others, works independently, and embraces a growth mindset.

- Owns a personal computer/laptop with high-speed internet, a webcam for remote work, and a noise-canceling headset for G-Meet meetings.



Job Details:

- Part-time: 24 hours per week, Monday to Saturday (Saturday work required).

- Salary: $300/month.

- Payment: Monthly.



At Spectre Ventures, we’re all about learning and growth. We provide trainings and many opportunities to learn new skills and grow within the company. If you thrive in a supportive yet challenging setting and are eager to grow personally and professionally, we invite you to apply and join us on this exciting journey!



Apply Now and Let’s Build Something Great Together!



Important: Please read the requirements carefully before applying. Candidates who don’t meet the criteria won’t be considered. Include your resume/CV with your application to qualify and add a short video introduction too.

title: Video Editor & Image Designer
description:
ABOUT US 

We are a fast-growing DTC skincare eCommerce brand. We are looking for a long-term tea
mber, not a freelancer, who wants to build a stable career with us.



We believe in empowering our team. You will get access (and training!) on premium AI tools like Higgsfield, Gemini, and ChatGPT to make your workflow faster and more creative.



WHO YOU ARE 

We are looking for a "preditor" (Producer/Editor)—someone who understands storytelling, pacing, and marketing, not just button-pushing.



- You possess a "student mindset": You take feedback well, you don't take critiques personally, and you improve quickly. We are looking for someone who wants to learn and grow, not someone who thinks they already know everything.

- You are efficient: You can edit a high-quality 60-second video in 2-3 hours and create a social graphic in 1-2 hours without sacrificing quality.

- You are detail-oriented: You have 0% tolerance for typos in captions and overlays.

- You are tech-savvy: You are excited to use AI to generate ideas and speed up your work.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Short-Form Video: Edit engaging Reels, Shorts, and TikToks (15–90 seconds) focused on UGC, products, and trends.

- Long-Form Video: Edit YouTube videos, and VSLs (5+ minutes) with clean pacing and storytelling.

- Engagement: Add animated captions, text callouts, B-roll, and visual hooks to keep retention high.

- Graphic Design: Create static ad creatives, quote cards, thumbnails, and simple motion ads.

- Photo Editing: Retouch, resize, and clean up product/lifestyle images.

- Copywriting: Write and polish short English hooks/headlines for your videos and ads.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS (Must Have)

- Computer Specs: You must have a PC capable of editing 4K footage and running Adobe Premiere Pro/After Effects without lag or crashing. (Recommended: 16GB+ RAM, SSD Storage).

- Internet Connection: You must have a reliable, high-speed internet connection (Fiber preferred). You will be required to download and upload large batches of raw 4K video files from Google Drive daily.

- Software: Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred), CapCut, or Final Cut + Canva/Photoshop/Figma or equivalent.



WHY JOIN US? 

- Day Shift Schedule: Enjoy your evenings and weekends! Work normal PH business hours. 

- AI Training: We pay for the tools and teach you how to use them. 

- Stability: We are looking for a partner for the long haul. 

- Portfolio: Build a portfolio with a professional beauty brand.



Schedule & Pay:

- Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM–6:00 PM Philippine time

- $600/month



HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully) 

To ensure you are paying attention to detail, applications that do not follow these steps will be ignored.



Please reply to this job post with the subject line: "Creative Editor - [Your Name]" and include the following:

- Your video introduction.

- Your Portfolio: A link to your best work. Please highlight Short-Form Videos (TikTok/Reels).

- Your updated resume.



Hiring Process:

1. Submit Application

2. Shortlisted candidates do a simple creative test

3. Short video interview

4. Job Offer



We look forward to meeting you!

title: People Operations Associate
description:
We are looking for a People Operations Associate to support both Process Engineering and People Operations initiatives. This role is execution-driven with manager support and is best suited for someone who takes ownership, operates independently, and contributes to building a more structured and scalable organization.



You will work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to manage operational workflows, support hiring, and strengthen internal systems and processes.



What You’ll Do



Process Engineering



-Assist in rolling out new processes, workflows, SOPs, and operational tools

-Onboard crew members to new initiatives and ensure proper adoption

-Track operational initiatives, action items, and cross-team follow-ups to maintain accountability

-Maintain visibility across projects to ensure timelines and deliverables stay on track

-Identify workflow gaps, analyze inefficiencies, and recommend improvements

-Gather feedback on processes and contribute to organizational development and continuous improvement efforts



People Operations



-Manage crew member records, onboarding documentation, and internal reports

-Coordinate onboarding and employee lifecycle administration

-Support coaching coordination, internal feedback loops, and engagement initiatives

-Conduct or support quality reviews to ensure operational standards are followed

-Coordinate with hiring managers to assess staffing needs and move candidates efficiently

-Maintain accurate and organized candidate and hiring records



How You Work

-You take full ownership of your responsibilities and follow through without constant oversight

-You execute with minimal guidance while keeping stakeholders informed

-You proactively identify gaps, risks, and inefficiencies, and take action on them

-You analyze situations and recommend solutions, not just complete assigned tasks

-You take initiative in ambiguous situations and work toward clarity before escalating

-You come forward with solutions, not just questions

-You balance supporting people with improving systems and operational efficiency

-You contribute to building structure, accountability, and consistency across the organization



Requirements

-1–3 years of experience in HR, operations, administration, or VA roles

-Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

-Ability to manage multiple workflows and maintain structured documentation

-Strong communication and coordination skills

-Comfortable using Google Workspace and learning tools such as Airtable, Notion, and ChatGPT

-Demonstrates integrity, accountability, and reliability



Nice to Have

-Experience supporting process improvement or operational initiatives

-Familiarity with process documentation or SOP creation

-Experience in project coordination or task tracking

-Exposure to quality reviews or operational audits



Success in This Role Looks Like

-Operational workflows and initiatives are clearly tracked, organized, and on schedule

-People Operations processes and records are consistently maintained

-Hiring coordination runs smoothly and efficiently

-Process gaps are identified early and addressed proactively

-Documentation is structured, accurate, and continuously improved

-Accountability across tasks, follow-ups, and deliverables is consistently maintained

-You act as a reliable operator who drives execution and strengthens internal systems



Not Ideal For

-Candidates who rely heavily on structured, step-by-step guidance

-Those who wait for instructions instead of taking initiative



What We Offer

Fully Remote, Flexible Hours (Philippines-based)

Merit-based pay and growth opportunities

Professional development budget

HMO, equipment subsidy, year-end bonus

1-month structured onboarding program

How to Apply



Submit via: 
/app7NwwAXu0h3NTtW/shrrPhalrcg1fk795

Only applications through the form will be reviewed.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter – $2,000–$4,000/Month
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Mon–Fri, day shift



ABOUT US



Young Publisher | 



- We’re an international digital publishing company

- We've been hiring Filipinos for over 5 years

- We offer long-term roles

- We don't disappear, we pay on time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced Direct-Response Copywriter who can:



- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create stop-scrolling ads

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act



This is a full-time role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



BENEFITS



- Get direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter: a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



ROLE SUMMARY



- Full-time (Mon–Fri, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000 – $4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of direct-response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



HIRING PROCESS



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Marketing Expert
description:
Are you a data-driven marketer who knows how to fill a clinic’s booking calendar and membership enrolments?



Transform Health and Beauty Clinic and The Transform Elite are expanding! We are launching exclusive membership programmes and a first-of-its-kind Longevity Lounge in Horsham, UK. We are looking for a sharp, results-oriented Digital Marketing Specialist to help us dominate the local market.



We don’t just want "posts"; we want conversions. If you have a track record of running successful campaigns for medical spas, aesthetic clinics, or wellness centers, we want to talk to you.



The Campaigns You’ll Lead:

- The Launch: Founding member sign-ups for our new Membership & Longevity Lounge.

- The Staples: High-ROI Laser Hair Removal and injectable packages.

- The Engine: Retention and re-engagement
 sequences to keep our treatment rooms full.



What You’ll Do:

- Meta Ads: End-to-end management of
 & Instagram (A/B testing, pixel tracking, Retargeting).

- Google Ads: Capture "near me" intent for high-value treatments.

- Funnel Building: Ensuring the journey from "Click" to "Booked Appointment" is seamless.

- Reporting: No fluff. Weekly reports on spend vs. leads vs. conversion.



Requirements:

- Industry Context: You understand the difference between marketing a £50 facial and a £2,000 longevity package.

- Technical Mastery: Expert-level Meta Business Suite and Google Ads.

- Self-Starter: You tell us what we need to do to improve, not the other way around.

- Tools: Experience with GoHighLevel (preferred) or similar CRM/automation tools.



Why Join Us?

This is a project-based "gig" to start, but we are growing fast. For the right person, this will turn into a long-term, stable partnership with a premium UK brand.



How to Apply:

Please follow these instructions exactly:

1. Attach your Resume.

2. Include a short summary of your experience, specifically with clinics or service-based businesses.

3. Show the Proof: Provide screenshots or links to past campaign results (ROAS, CPL, or Lead counts).

4. The Secret Word: Start your application subject line with “ClinicMarketing”.

title: Client Success Manager
description:
CLIENT SUCCESS MANAGER 

Are you the kind of person who lights up a room with your energy, loves connecting with people, and thrives on making others feel seen, supported, and successful?



If you’ve got a knack for communication, a sprinkle of sales confidence, and a heart for helping others win this might just be your dream role.



We’re looking for a Client Success Manager to join our fast-growing personal development company, Dream Out Loud, where our mission is to help entrepreneurs design and live their dream life through world-class coaching, programs, and events.

You’ll be the bridge between our clients and our company ensuring every student, attendee, and mastermind member feels valued, heard, and guided through their journey to success.



This is not a boring admin role. This is a people's role full of energy, impact, and purpose. You’ll be part coach, part concierge, part problem-solver… and 100% obsessed with client happiness.



Key Responsibilities

Client Relationship Champion: Be the first point of contact for clients answering questions, solving challenges, and turning every interaction into a world-class experience.



Engagement & Retention: Help clients stay on track with their programs and events, ensuring they get incredible results and remain raving fans for life.



Sales Support & Upsells: Confidently guide clients through renewal or upgrade conversations with empathy and subtle sales finesse.



 & Inbox Management: Transform negative
s into positive experiences — you’re a pro at turning tension into trust.



Onboarding & Off boarding: Ensure every new client feels celebrated and every graduating client feels appreciated and connected.



Community Vibe Leader: Bring fun, energy, and accountability to our online communities (Skool, Slack, etc.) — celebrate wins, spark conversations, and keep the vibe high.



Event Support: Be a key player during live events greeting clients, assisting with check-ins, and ensuring every detail runs smoothly.



Feedback Loops: Collect testimonials, feedback, and insights to help us constantly improve the client journey.



Key Strengths

World-Class Communicator: You can write and speak in a way that makes people feel understood, supported, and inspired.



Natural Negotiator: You know how to guide conversations toward win-win outcomes with warmth and confidence.



People-Lover: You genuinely enjoy helping others and seeing them succeed.



Emotionally Intelligent: You can read people, hold space, and defuse tension effortlessly.



Sales-Savvy: You’re comfortable handling objections, guiding decisions, and celebrating the “yes.”



Organised & Reliable: You follow through, track details, and keep clients and tea
mbers in sync.



Positive Energy: You bring lightness and fun to everything you do.



Resilient: You stay calm under pressure and can turn any challenge into a growth 
nt.



Growth-Minded: You love personal development, learning, and being part of something that changes lives.



Why This Role Rocks

Massive Growth: You’ll be surrounded by high-performers and personal development leaders — learning skills most people pay thousands for.



Community & Impact: Every day, you’ll help people transform their lives. Your work literally changes futures.



Access to All Programs: Complimentary access to our full suite of events and programs grow personally while you grow professionally.



Fun Team Culture: We work hard, play hard, and celebrate often. Expect energy, laughter, and purpose in everything we do.



About You

You’re not just looking for another job you’re looking to make a difference.



You love building relationships, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and take pride in being the calm, confident problem-solver everyone turns to.



You’re self-motivated, adaptable, and have that perfect balance of empathy and assertiveness that makes people feel safe — and led.



If you’ve got experience in client success, customer service, account management, or sales even better. But what matters most is your attitude, heart, and communication skills.



How to Apply

Record a short 3-minute video answering the following questions:

Why are you interested in this position?

What do you know about our company?

How do you handle difficult clients or
s?

What are your strengths in communication or sales?

Where do you see yourself in five years?



Then
 your video + resume + short cover letter to:





(Pro tip: Mention your favourite motivational quote in your subject line it’ll show us you’ve got great energy and attention to detail.)

This role will fill fast, so if you’re still reading this and your heart’s racing a little… hit record and send it in today.

title: Executive Assistant To CEO
description:
Are you a go-getter with a passion for organisation, streamlining processes, and bringing calm to chaos so extraordinary things can happen?



If so, read on...



We’re looking for a proactive, driven, and caring Executive Assistant to support the CEO of a fast-growing personal development company. Our mission is to help entrepreneurs design their dream life through transformational coaching, events, and programs.



As the Executive Assistant, you’ll act as the right hand to the CEO—keeping operations tight, communication seamless, and priorities crystal clear. You’ll need to be tech-savvy, systems-oriented, trustworthy, and obsessed with excellence. 



You’ll thrive on anticipating problems before they happen, streamlining workflows, and creating structure so the CEO can focus on vision and growth.



Key Responsibilities:

Calendar Management: Coordinate meetings, 1:1 calls, podcasts, and event-related bookings. Manage both personal and professional scheduling with precision.

Inbox Management: Organise and prioritise
s for the CEO, ensuring timely and professional responses.

Travel Management: Plan and book complex domestic and international travel itineraries, including flights, accommodation, and transfers. Prepare expense reports as needed.

Executive Admin Support: Prepare reports, presentations, and documents. Maintain accurate records and ensure all digital files are easily accessible.

Project Assistance: Track project milestones, deadlines, and deliverables. Provide regular updates and ensure accountability across initiatives.

Event & Podcast Coordination: Handle virtual logistics for event planning, speaker bookings, and podcast appearances. Communicate with external stakeholders on behalf of the CEO.

Communication Management: Act as the first point of contact for both internal and external communication. Draft and edit correspondence with professionalism and discretion.

Process Documentation: Create, update, and refine systems and SOPs to streamline the business.



Key Strengths

Trustworthy: High standards, professional boundaries, and a strong sense of discretion.



Excellent Communicator: Both written and verbal, with the ability to represent the CEO clearly and confidently.



Highly Organised: Thrives on structure, checklists, and improving processes.



Adaptable: Able to pivot quickly between tasks without losing focus.



Growth-Minded: Hungry to learn, improve, and grow with the company.



Multi-Tasking Pro: Skilled at juggling multiple projects while maintaining accuracy and calm.



Process-Driven: Loves creating systems that simplify and scale.



Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with Google Suite (especially Calendar, Docs, Sheets, and Slides) and other productivity tools.



Creative Eye: Can assist with visual projects like presentations, PDFs, and client documents.



Strong Memory & Foresight: Able to retain details, anticipate needs, and plan ahead.



Strong: Not afraid of hearing feedback, the word no and are ok giving direct feedback to the CEO and keeping him on time.



Why This Role Rocks...



Work from Anywhere: 100% remote. Work from home, a café, or the beach—it’s up to you, as long as deadlines are met and work is top-quality.



Flexible Hours: Our core business hours are 9–6 PM AEST, but you’ll have flexibility to design your schedule while supporting the CEO’s priorities.



Growth Opportunities: You’ll be directly exposed to high-level strategy, leadership, and personal development—learning what others pay tens of thousands to access.



Personal Development Access: Enjoy complimentary access to all company programs and trainings.



Close Proximity to the CEO’s Network: Gain exposure to world-class entrepreneurs, thought leaders, and high-achievers.



About You



You’re not just looking for “a job”—you’re looking for an opportunity to grow alongside a visionary leader. You’re resourceful, quick-thinking, and thrive in fast-paced environments. You take pride in doing things well, and you can’t sleep at night knowing tasks are left unfinished or subpar.



This role is open to experience executive assistants only with the chance for exponential growth within the company.

If this excites you, we’d love to hear from you. (Pro tip: mention your favourite movie in the subject line of your application—we’ll know you’re detail-oriented and thorough.)



How to apply: 

Record a short 3 min video of you answering the below questions



Why are you interested in this position?

What do you know about our company?

What is your ideal work environment?

What are your strengths?

Where do you see yourself in five years?




: 
 with your video and resume and cover letter. 



This role will fill quickly, so if you've read this far and are interested in the spot, act fast ;)

title: Graphic & Multimedia Designer – E-commerce (Amazon)
description:
Join Our Growing Design Team at Roots & Branches



Hi there! We're looking for our second creative powerhouse, a digital graphic designer, but not just any designer. We're looking for someone who understands the e-commerce game, especially when it comes to Amazon. Someone who knows that great design doesn't just look good, but actually sells.



We already have a strong designer in our team, leading brandbooks and full-scale creative direction. What we're missing now is a versatile, hands-on designer who can turn ideas into assets that convert across platforms like Amazon, social media, and our own webshops. If you can switch effortlessly between digital, print, and motion — this is for you.



What You'll Be Doing

- You'll be part of a small but ambitious team that creates all content for our brands, ranging from:

- E-commerce Visuals to different marketplaces

- Brand Ecommerce Page, Storefronts

- Cross-platform creatives for campaigns

- Concept development and execution for digital visuals

- Short-form videos, product explainers, infographic-style edits

- Work closely with our Lead Designer on campaigns, product launches, and creative refreshes

- Collaborate with our lead designer to execute full campaigns, new product launches, and content refreshes.





What We're Looking For:



Tech Skills

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects & Premiere Pro)

- Proficiency in Figma (Figma Design & FigJam)

- Experience with graphic design for e-commerce, especially Amazon listings & A+ Content

- Video editing skills are a must (focus on short iinfographic videos & video ads)

- Basic understanding of UI/UX and bonus points for HTML & CSS

- Open to working with AI tools (for creativity & efficiency)



Soft Skills

- Creativity paired with commercial thinking — you don’t just design, you design to sell.

- Strong communication & collaboration skills.

- Ability to juggle multiple projects — digital, video — without losing quality.

- Eye for composition, layout, typography and product photography.

- Flexible and fast — e-commerce waits for no one.



Non-Negotiable

- Strong portfolio showcasing e-commerce & other digital graphic design work

(We won’t move forward without seeing past Amazon and/or online retail-related work.)

- Experience working with EU or US brands

- Experience with A/B testing of creatives

- Worked for an e-commerce aggregator, agency, or brand-focused environment



What We Offer

- Competitive freelancer salary from 800 to 1300 USD depending on experience + 13th month performance-based bonus.

- Full-time, fully remote role (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

- Creative freedom, personal responsibility, and a role where you can actually make an impact

- 40-hour work week

- Health insurance & pension funds (5000 PHP extra per month)

- A fun, young international team that’s passionate about health, design, and growing online brands

- Direct collaboration with owners, marketers, and senior designers

- 25 holidays per year



About Roots & Branches

Roots & Branches is a European brand group focused on health & wellness products. We create & sell products under several brands through Amazon, our own webshops, and other platforms across Europe. We believe in making products that genuinely improve well-being - and you’ll help us make them look great and sell even better.



How to Apply

Please fill out this form:



Attention to detail test:

In question 7 of the form, mention the word Pineapple so we know you actually read this post. Applications without it will not be considered. All applicants should make a short introduction video where you tell a bit about yourself and why you would fit in our company based on your experience. No video is no submission.

title: Graphic & Multimedia Designer - Marketing & Ads Creatives

 Newsletters
