title: Graphic & Multimedia Designer – E-commerce Platforms (Amazon & Bol etc)
description:
Join Our Growing Design Team at Ella Health



Hi there! We're looking for our second creative powerhouse, a digital graphic designer, but not just any designer. We're looking for someone who understands the e-commerce game, especially when it comes to Amazon. Someone who knows that great design doesn't just look good, but actually sells.



We already have a strong designer in our team, leading brandbooks and full-scale creative direction. What we're missing now is a versatile, hands-on designer who can turn ideas into assets that convert across platforms like Amazon, social media, and our own webshops. If you can switch effortlessly between digital, print, and motion — this is for you.



What You'll Be Doing

- You'll be part of a small but ambitious team that creates all content for our brands, ranging from:

- E-commerce Visuals to different marketplaces

- Brand Ecommerce Page, Storefronts

- Cross-platform creatives for campaigns

- Concept development and execution for digital visuals

- Short-form videos, product explainers, infographic-style edits

- Work closely with our Lead Designer on campaigns, product launches, and creative refreshes

- Collaborate with our lead designer to execute full campaigns, new product launches, and content refreshes.





What We're Looking For

? Tech Skills

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects & Premiere Pro)

- Proficiency in Figma (Figma Design & FigJam)

- Experience with graphic design for e-commerce, especially Amazon listings & A+ Content

- Video editing skills are a must (focus on short iinfographic videos & video ads)

- Basic understanding of UI/UX and bonus points for HTML & CSS

- Open to working with AI tools (for creativity & efficiency)



? Soft Skills

- Creativity paired with commercial thinking — you don’t just design, you design to sell.

- Strong communication & collaboration skills.

- Ability to juggle multiple projects — digital, video — without losing quality.

- Eye for composition, layout, typography and product photography.

- Flexible and fast — e-commerce waits for no one.



? Non-Negotiable

- Strong portfolio showcasing e-commerce & other digital graphic design work

(We won’t move forward without seeing past Amazon and/or online retail-related work.)

- Experience working with EU or US brands

- Experience with A/B testing of creatives

- Worked for an e-commerce aggregator, agency, or brand-focused environment



What We Offer

- Competitive compensation depending on experience + performance-based bonuses

- Full-time, fully remote role (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

- Creative freedom, personal responsibility, and a role where you can actually make an impact

- 40-hour work week

- Health insurance & pension funds

- A fun, young international team that’s passionate about health, design, and growing online brands

- Direct collaboration with owners, marketers, and senior designers

- 25 holidays per year



About Roots & Branches

Roots & Branches is a European brand group focused on health & wellness products. We create & sell products under several brands through Amazon, our own webshops, and other platforms across Europe. We believe in making products that genuinely improve well-being - and you’ll help us make them look great and sell even better.



How to Apply

Please fill out this form:

In question 7 of the form, mention the word Pineapple so we know you actually read this post. Applications without it will not be considered.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
**IF YOU ARE NOT EXPERIENCED WITH FIGMA, DO NOT APPLY**



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Graphic Designer (Logos, Branding, Ads) – Remote

Chain Lightning Design & Marketing (CLDM)



Are you a designer looking to be a part of the next big design revolution? 



We are building the fastest and most talented design teams in the world.



CLDM is a new design and marketing company that produces branding, logos, and marketing campaigns live with clients in real-time.



Instead of taking weeks like traditional agencies, we create designs in rapid iteration sessions and launch brands in hours.

We are looking for fast, talented designers who want to improve their skills and grow with an international team.



Compensation



Starting pay: 250 PHP/hr

Generous bonuses available during live design shows - potentially doubling the hourly pay or more. This will be explained during the interview. This is the starting pay but expect this to go up significantly as you climb up the company!



Work Schedule



You must be able to collaborate across:

Pacific Standard Time (PST)

Philippine Standard Time (PhST)

Typical collaboration window examples:

10:00 PM PST / 2:00 PM PhST

Design Show will require other hours to accommodate our U.S. based clients. Possibly:

7:00 AM PST / 11:00 PM PhST



What You Will Design



• Logos • Brand identity systems

• Social media ads

• Flyers and marketing assets

• Mockups for merchandise

• Campaign graphics

Designers must be able to produce ideas quickly and iterate fast. Leveraging AI is required.



Required Skills



Must be highly skilled with:

• Figma / FigJam

• Adobe Suite

• Ai tools (Claude, Nano Banana, ChatGPT)



Nice to have:

• Canva

• AI design tools

• Branding experience



Important: This Is a Fast Design Environment

Chain-Lightning designers work in rapid design sprints.

This role is ideal for designers who:

• Work fast

• Produce multiple ideas

• Learn quickly

• Enjoy creative challenges



This Job Is NOT For

Designers who:

• Need several days for one design

• Prefer slow revision cycles

• Do not like feedback or iteration



How to Apply

Submit:

Portfolio

Resume



Also answer this question:

How many logo concepts can you create in 30 minutes?

Applications that do not answer this question will be ignored.



Much of this position is a learning opportunity where the job pays you to learn. Then we’ll put those skills to a live demonstration for the customers. 



We’re revolutionizing the way the design industry is operating and we’re looking to build the most talented design team to lead it. 



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Senior Full-Stack Cloud Engineer (Healthcare AI Platform)
description:
READ UNTIL THE END TO QUALIFY:



Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time

Salary: Competitive — commensurate with experience and location



Company Overview



We are a leading Remote Hospitality Center for optometry practices in the United States. We provide human-powered call center services augmented by AI technology — handling patient calls, appointment scheduling, insurance verification, and recall campaigns for eye care practices of all sizes. Our proprietary cloud platform powers operations for dozens of clinics serving thousands of patients.



We're growing fast and building ambitious products: a real-time client portal with call analytics, AI-driven transcription and quality scoring, automated phone system management, and a new EHR platform for optometry practices.



Job Description

We're looking for a Senior Full-Stack Cloud Engineer to join our tech team and take ownership of building and scaling the platforms that power our operations. This is a high-impact, high-autonomy role — you'll work directly with our Tech Lead and CEO on products used daily by real clinics handling real patient interactions.



Key Responsibilities

Platform Development

Build and extend our serverless client portal (React/TypeScript frontend, Python Lambda backend)

Develop real-time dashboards for call analytics, appointment metrics, and agent performance

Manage DynamoDB and PostgreSQL databases in a dual-write architecture



Phone System & AI

Automate client onboarding onto Amazon Connect (phone provisioning, routing, IVR, AI bot setup)

Integrate AI transcription (DeepGram) and quality analysis into call workflows

Maintain and improve AI overflow/after-hours bots for patient call handling



New Product — OptometryConnect EHR

Help architect a new optometry-focused EHR on Oystehr's HIPAA-compliant headless platform

Build scheduling, patient records, and insurance integration features

Work with Supabase for data management and authentication



Infrastructure

Manage AWS infrastructure with Terraform (IaC)

Maintain CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions

Implement multi-environment deployments (dev/staging/production)



Integrations

Build and maintain API connections to HubSpot, 
, GoHighLevel, RingCentral, and other platforms

Create webhook-driven automation workflows



Required Qualifications

3+ years building and deploying serverless applications on AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, Cognito)

Full-stack development skills: React/TypeScript (frontend) and Python (backend)

Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform preferred)

CI/CD pipeline management (GitHub Actions or equivalent)

API design, integration, and webhook architecture across multiple third-party services

Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently in ambiguous environments



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with Amazon Connect or contact center platforms

HIPAA compliance knowledge and experience handling protected health information

Experience with headless EHR/CMS architectures (Oystehr, Medplum, FHIR)

Supabase experience (auth, storage, real-time, edge functions)

Healthcare technology, optometry, or practice management software background

Daily use of AI development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot)



Technology Stack

Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, AWS Amplify

Backend: Python 3.12 on AWS Lambda, API Gateway

Databases: DynamoDB, PostgreSQL (RDS), Supabase, S3

Infrastructure: AWS (CloudFront, S3, Cognito, Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, Amazon Connect), Terraform

AI/ML: DeepGram, Claude/OpenAI, Bland AI

Integrations: RingCentral, HubSpot, 
, GoHighLevel, Zapier, N8N



Benefits

Fully remote work

Competitive compensation

Small team with direct access to leadership — no bureaucracy

Greenfield product development opportunities (OptometryConnect EHR)

AI-forward development culture with access to cutting-edge tools

Direct impact — your work affects real healthcare operations serving thousands of patients



To Apply:

Next step: 
/link/index/JB-33ZRPDDJF?u=
Fill this out: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

Answer this question and
 it to: 

Describe a time you had to d
 what NOT to build. What was the context, what did you cut, and how did that decision turn out?

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant – Store Administrator
description:
We are a U.S.-based Amazon FBA/FBM reselling business looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help manage day-to-day Amazon store operations.



Responsibilities:

• Monitor and track customer orders daily across FBA and FBM

• Notate order statuses, tracking numbers, and delivery updates in our tracking system

• Watch for and flag any account health alerts, policy notifications, or listing issues in Seller Central

• Update listings as needed (titles, descriptions, images, pricing adjustments)

• Communicate any urgent issues (suppressed listings, buyer messages, returns) promptly

• Assist with basic administrative tasks related to store operations



Requirements:

• Prior experience working inside Amazon Seller Central (required)

• Familiarity with FBA and FBM order management

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow established processes

• Reliable internet connection and available during U.S. business hours

• Good written English communication skills

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• Experience with Google Sheets or Excel a plus



Compensation & Growth:

• Starting salary: $400/month

• Opportunity for salary increases based on performance and business growth

• Long-term position with a growing U.S. Amazon business

• Clear processes and training provided

• Direct communication with the business owner



To apply, please include a brief description of your Amazon Seller Central experience and any stores or sellers you have previously worked with.

title: Video editor high perfoming ecom brand - short form content facebook
description:
We are a fast growing ecom startup in the pet niche with a mission to scale fast. Currently, we have a team of two full-time video editors, and as we grow, we are looking for a third high-performer to join the pack. If you are a fast-paced editor who loves the efficiency of AI, this is for you.



We don’t need "starving artists" or perfectionists who spend hours on a single frame. We need Assembly Specialists: high-performers who can take raw components, AI avatars, brand B-roll, and snappy captions, and fuse them into high-converting short-form content.



The Role: What You’ll Be Doing



Your goal is to make the spoken message clear, engaging, and lightning-fast.



AI Integration: Generating and syncing AI avatars (primarily using HeyGen).



Rapid Assembly: Using fast cuts to maintain high viewer retention.



Visual Sourcing & Creation: Pulling B-roll from our internal brand folder, sourcing from the web, or generating custom B-roll using AI tools.



Precision Editing: Following detailed briefs to ensure every "piece" of the content puzzle fits perfectly.



What We Look For



Speed & Quality: You understand that "done is better than perfect," but you don't sacrifice brand standards.



Technical Agility: You are comfortable jumping between editing software and AI generation tools.



Reliability: We provide the instructions; you provide the output. You take feedback well and apply it instantly.



Compensation & Tools



We believe in rewarding efficiency and results. Instead of a traditional hourly rate, we pay per minute of finished content.



The Math: Based on our previous rate of $5/hour and an average editing speed of 1 minute per 2 hours, we offer $10 per finished minute of content.



Efficiency Bonus: If you are faster and more precise, your effective hourly rate increases significantly.



Winning Video Bonus: We scale fast, and we want you to grow with us. You will receive a bonus for "winning videos" that perform exceptionally well for the brand.



Feedback Policy: Detailed feedback is provided for every video. Revisions based on original instructions are part of the per-minute rate, rewarding those who are precise the first time.



Everything Provided: We cover the costs of all AI tools (HeyGen, Midjourney, etc.) and editing software subscriptions.



How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with the following:



Your Experience: A brief summary of your work with e-commerce or short-form brands.



AI Expertise: Specifically, tell us about your experience using AI tools to create B-roll or visual assets (e.g., Midjourney, Runway, Pika, etc.).



Portfolio: Links to your best fast-cut/short-form edits.



Tools: Do you primarily use CapCut or Adobe Premiere/After Effects?



Speed Check: On average, how long does it take you to edit 1 minute of high-quality short-form video?



IMPORTANT: To show you have read the entire post and follow instructions precisely, please include the word Yellow in your application title.

title: FUNNEL BUILDER WANTED FOR 7-FIGURE ECOM BRAND
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a new tea
mber to join our fast-growing 7-figure eCommerce business.



We are currently looking for someone responsible for one of the most important parts of our business: building high-converting funnels and ad creatives.

title: Google Ads & Google Merchant Specialist
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing U.S. coffee importer and ecommerce brand selling premium Italian roasted coffee through Shopify and Amazon.

We are expanding our Shopify sales channel and are looking for a Google Ads & Google Merchant Specialist to help manage, optimize, and scale profitable campaigns.

This is a long-term position with growth opportunity.

Responsibilities



Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Performance Max, Shopping, Search)

Optimize Google Merchant Center product feeds

Fix product disapprovals and Merchant compliance issues

Improve ROAS and reduce CPA

Conduct keyword research and search term optimization

Build new campaign structures for scaling

Monitor daily performance and budget pacing

Provide weekly performance reports

Suggest landing page and conversion improvements for Shopify store

Coordinate with creative / UGC team for new ad assets

Requirements



Minimum 2+ years experience managing Google Ads for ecommerce brands

Strong experience with Google Merchant Center

Experience running Performance Max and Shopping campaigns

Experience with Shopify stores

Understanding of ROAS, CPA, AOV and profitability

Experience with Google Analytics / conversion tracking

Strong English communication

Ability to work U.S. business hours (partial overlap)

Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience with food / beverage brands

Experience fixing Merchant suspensions

Experience with feed tools (Simprosys / Feedonomics / DataFeedWatch)

Landing page CRO experience

Experience scaling campaigns above $5,000/month spend

Compensation



Starting salary: $700 – $1200/month depending on experience

Performance bonus based on ROAS improvement

Long-term growth opportunity

Possible full marketing lead role in the future

To Apply

Please include:



Resume

Screenshots or proof of past campaign performance

Example ROAS achieved

Shopify brands you worked with

Short video introduction (2 minutes)

title: Shopify Store Builder (Freelance / Part-time)
description:
We're looking for a hands-on Shopify store builder to help set up and optimize our e-commerce stores. You'll be responsible for building clean, converting storefronts from the ground up — or improving existing ones.



**What you'll be working on:**

- Building and customizing Shopify themes (experience with Horizon is a big plus)

- Setting up navigation menus and collection structures

- Organizing and presenting products with high-quality images and well-structured layouts

- Creating and publishing store policies (returns, shipping, privacy, terms)

- Making sure the store looks professional and is set up to convert



**What we're looking for:**

- Proven experience building Shopify stores (please share examples)

- Familiar with the Horizon theme or similar modern Shopify themes

- Eye for design — you know what a clean, trustworthy storefront looks like

- Able to work independently and deliver without hand-holding

- Good communication in English

- Available for ongoing work (we run multiple stores)



**Nice to have:**

- Experience with dropshipping stores

- Basic knowledge of Shopify SEO and Google Shopping requirements



**To apply:**

Send us a short intro + links to Shopify stores you've built or worked on. Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



***APPLICANTS MUST HAVE PROVEN VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH FACILITIES OR PROPERTY SERVICE BUSINESSES (E.G., PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS, FACILITIES MANAGEMENT, TENANT SERVICES, OR BUILDING MANAGEMENT***



We're looking for a reliable, detail-focused Virtual Assistant to join us.



In this role, you’ll work closely with our office managers. Your job is to handle the day-to-day admin and documentation tasks so our managers can focus on higher-level client support and business growth.



If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and helping small businesses run smoothly, this could be a great fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Prepare and send invoices for services and products

• Process registrations, documentation, and related records

• Complete and submit required forms and paperwork

• Assist with permits, applications, and administrative documentation as needed

• Create simple, professional social media posts

• Organize digital files and maintain accurate records

• Provide general administrative support to managers and tea
mbers as needed

• Helping with customer-related follow-ups when needed



What We're Looking For:

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) - MUST

• Solid experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an administrative support role - MUST

• Background supporting facilities or property service business - MUST

• Experience handling rebates, permits, or compliance paperwork - ADVANTAGE

• Comfortable creating basic social media content

• Tech-savvy and confident, learning new systems quickly

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision



Work Details:

• Full-time, remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



To apply for this position, please follow the steps below:

   1. Use "VA" as the subject line of your application

   2. Submit a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

   3. Include a link to your CV



****WE WILL NOT CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH NO CVS/RESUMES.***

title: Amazon PPC expert UK Market place
description:
Amazon PPC Specialist



We’re looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Specialist to take ownership of our advertising performance  for the UK market. This role is focused on driving growth, improving efficiency, and scaling profitable campaigns.



You’ll manage the full campaign lifecycle — from strategy and setup through to optimisation, reporting, and scaling.



Key Responsibilities



• Plan, create, and manage Amazon Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns

• Perform in-depth keyword research using tools such as Helium10, Amazon Brand Analytics, and other PPC platforms

• Continuously optimise bids, placements, and budgets to achieve target ACOS / TACOS goals

• Build and maintain structured campaign frameworks (Auto, Research, Manual, Exact, and Ranking campaigns)

• Analyse search term reports to identify new opportunities, apply negative keywords, and reduce wasted ad spend

• Monitor campaign performance and make data-driven optimisation decisions

• Provide regular performance reports and insights to support strategic growth



Ideal Candidate



• Proven experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns at scale

• Strong understanding of Amazon advertising strategy and keyword targeting

• Experience with Helium10, Brand Analytics, and Amazon Ads console

• Analytical mindset with a focus on profitability and performance metrics

• Ability to identify opportunities to scale winning products and campaigns



How to Apply

Send: a copy of your CV



Type "Amazon PPC expert" and your age in the subject

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to help design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s ecommerce platforms. You’ll work on microservices, APIs, and integrations, while mentoring others and driving technical excellence.



You’ll take a leading role in shaping the architecture of our ecommerce infrastructure. You’ll build reliable APIs, optimize performance, and ensure our systems scale as we expand globally. Beyond coding, you’ll mentor teammates, influence technical direction, and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.



What You’ll Do:



- Architect Our API-First Future: Design, develop, and maintain a robust and high-performance API layer that will serve as the core of our headless platform.



- Own the Backend: Take full ownership of key backend services, from design to deployment, ensuring they align with our API-first strategy.



- Drive Modernization: Lead the modernization of our existing system, with a clear focus on decoupling the frontend from the backend and creating a clean, API-first architecture. We prefer a pragmatic approach over the complexity and overhead of microservices.



- Mentor and Lead: Guide and mentor other backend developers, sharing your expertise in API design, performance, and best practices.



- Collaborate and Innovate: Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to translate ambitious goals into practical, well-engineered API specifications and solutions.



- Champion Best Practices: Introduce and advocate for modern API development tools, standards, and methodologies (e.g., OpenAPI, CI/CD, comprehensive testing).



Requirements

What We’re Looking For:



- Proven Seniority: At least 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong focus on PHP.



- API-First Mindset: Demonstrated experience designing and building scalable, RESTful or GraphQL APIs. You have a deep understanding of what it means to build a headless system.



- PHP8 Expertise: Deep, hands-on experience with modern PHP, including PHP8 and modern design patterns like TDD. You are comfortable with frameworks like Symfony and understand the nuances of the PHP ecosystem.



- Strategic & Pragmatic: You are a problem-solver who prioritizes impact and understands the challenges of a large-scale modernization project. You know when to refactor and when to build new, all while avoiding unnecessary complexity.



- Ownership Mentality: You are proactive about identifying and fixing issues and feel a strong sense of responsibility for the performance and health of the codebase.



- Data Savvy: Strong experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB) and a solid understanding of database design, optimization, and query performance in an API context.



- Experience with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).



- AI-Accelerated Development: You are knowledgeable about and in favor of using AI to accelerate the software development lifecycle. You're keen on exploring how AI can be leveraged to generate code, improve quality, and maximize output.





Nice to Have:



- Experience with e-commerce or high-traffic consumer environments.

- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

- Experience with message queues (e.g., GCP PubSub) or other asynchronous processing technologies.



What We Offer:

- Growth & Ownership: A performance culture where you grow fast, take ownership early, and design your own path: with access to AI learning and real responsibility.

- International Experience: Join a diverse team of 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities, collaborating across countries, cultures, and functions.

- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-paced, tech-driven scale-up where your ideas shape the future of customised products.

- Collaboration: Learn from experienced leaders, contribute to meaningful projects, and thrive in a team that’s serious about performance and people.

- Celebrations & Culture: From work anniversaries and team events to monthly Keynotes and seasonal awards, we make time to celebrate wins and give back through volunteering.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer - Remote
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s e-commerce platforms. You’ll work on APIs, integrations, and core backend services while mentoring peers and elevating engineering standards across the organization.



You will play a key role in shaping our API-first architecture, optimizing system performance, and ensuring our infrastructure scales globally. Beyond implementation, you will influence technical direction and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.



What You’ll Do

- Architect Our API-First Platform: Design, develop, and maintain a high-performance API layer that powers our headless commerce ecosystem. 

- Own Core Backend Services: Take end-to-end ownership of backend components—from system design and development to deployment and monitoring.

- Drive Platform Modernization: Lead the evolution of our legacy systems toward a clean, decoupled, API-first architecture, applying pragmatic engineering decisions over unnecessary complexity.

- Mentor and Elevate: Coach backend engineers on API design, performance optimization, and maintainable code practices.

- Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner with frontend engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to translate business objectives into robust API specifications.

- Champion Engineering Excellence: Advocate for modern development standards, including OpenAPI specifications, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and strong documentation practices.



What We’re Looking For

- Senior-Level Experience: 5+ years of professional backend development experience, with a strong emphasis on PHP.

- API-First Expertise: Proven experience building scalable RESTful or GraphQL APIs and designing headless architectures.

- PHP 8 Proficiency: Deep hands-on experience with modern PHP (PHP 8+), design patterns, and testing methodologies such as TDD. Experience with Symfony or similar frameworks is strongly preferred.

- Strategic & Pragmatic Thinking: Ability to balance refactoring versus rebuilding while navigating large-scale modernization initiatives.

- Strong Ownership Mentality: Proactive in identifying technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and architectural improvements.

- Database Mastery: Extensive experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB), including schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning in API-driven environments.

- Agile & Version Control: Experience working with Git and agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.

- AI-Accelerated Development: Comfortable leveraging AI tools to enhance productivity, code quality, and development velocity.



Nice to Have

- Experience in e-commerce or high-traffic consumer platforms.

- Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS or GCP) and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).

- Experience with asynchronous processing or message queues (e.g., GCP Pub/Sub).



What We Offer

- Growth & Ownership: A high-performance culture where you gain responsibility early and accelerate your development, supported by AI-driven learning.

- International Environment: Collaborate with 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities across multiple countries.

- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-scaling, tech-driven company where your contributions directly influence product evolution.

- Collaborative Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and contribute to meaningful, high-impact projects.

- Celebration & Recognition: From team events and milestone celebrations to company-wide keynotes and awards, we recognize and celebrate achievements.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.

Strategic & Pragmatic: You are a problem-solver who prioritizes impact and understands the challenges of a large-scale modernization project. You know when to refactor and when to build new, all while avoiding unnecessary complexity.



Ownership Mentality: You are proactive about identifying and fixing issues and feel a strong sense of responsibility for the performance and health of the codebase.



Data Savvy: Strong experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB) and a solid understanding of database design, optimization, and query performance in an API context.



Experience with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).



AI-Accelerated Development: You are knowledgeable about and in favor of using AI to accelerate the software development lifecycle. You're keen on exploring how AI can be leveraged to generate code, improve quality, and maximize output.





Nice to Have:



Experience with e-commerce or high-traffic consumer environments.



Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).



Experience with message queues (e.g., GCP PubSub) or other asynchronous processing technologies.







What We Offer:





- Growth & Ownership: A performance culture where you grow fast, take ownership early, and design your own path: with access to AI learning and real responsibility.



- International Experience: Join a diverse team of 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities, collaborating across countries, cultures, and functions.



- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-paced, tech-driven scale-up where your ideas shape the future of customised products.



- Collaboration: Learn from experienced leaders, contribute to meaningful projects, and thrive in a team that’s serious about performance and people.



- Celebrations & Culture: From work anniversaries and team events to monthly Keynotes and seasonal awards, we make time to celebrate wins and give back through volunteering.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: UI/UX Designer (Figma – SaaS & Web Projects)
description:
Remote | Contract / Part-Time / Full-Time



We are looking for a talented UI/UX Designer to support multiple web and SaaS projects. This role is ideal for someone who can take product requirements and translate them into clean, intuitive, and production-ready designs.



You’ll work closely with developers and stakeholders to bring ideas to life—designing interfaces that are not just visually appealing, but highly usable and aligned with real-world implementation.

We’re looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and capable of turning concepts into polished, functional designs that developers can execute seamlessly.

title: AI/ML Engineer (Contract – Remote)
description:

** Location: Remote

** Experience: 4–5 years



We are looking for a skilled AI/ML Engineer to help build intelligent systems that optimize infrastructure performance, cost efficiency, and resource allocation. This role focuses on designing and deploying machine learning models that support automated decision-making across cloud and containerized environments.



You will work closely with engineering and DevOps teams to develop scalable AI-driven solutions that process infrastructure metrics and generate real-time optimization strategies for modern systems and workloads



Key Responsibilities

title: AI Learning Experience Designer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking for an analytically sharp and editorially rigorous AI Learning Experience Designer to refine and calibrate AI-driven role-play simulations used in business schools and corporate learning environments .



This is not a traditional instructional design role. The core focus is AI prompt calibration and behavioural tuning strengthening persona realism, escalation logic, emotional tone, and learning alignment based on UAT feedback and live client trials .



Key Responsibilities:



* Analyse user feedback and live tests to refine AI behaviour

* Recalibrate prompts to improve realism, coherence, and challenge level

* Ensure alignment with learning objectives and persona psychology

* Diagnose issues in prompt structure, narrative logic, or instruction hierarchy

* Conduct structured simulation testing before client exposure

* Refine learner briefs, persona descriptions, and supporting materials

* Track iteration decisions and maintain version discipline



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong experience working with prompt-based AI systems

* Exceptional written English and editorial judgement

* Systems thinking mindset—understanding how small changes affect downstream behaviour

* Experience in instructional design, simulation learning, or behavioural training (preferred)

* High sensitivity to tone, escalation dynamics, and behavioural realism



This role requires precision, structured thinking, and intellectual curiosity about how psychology, narrative, and AI interaction intersect.



Please submit your CV and relevant experience when applying.

title: Head of Sales (with Real Estate Experience)
description:
Overview:

We are a growing real estate company offering tailored property packages to potential clients and customers through our online platform. We are looking for a results-driven project-based Head of Sales who can effectively manage client inquiries, nurture leads, and drive conversions, particularly for clients interested in purchasing properties abroad.



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in real estate sales, preferably handling international property clients

- Proven track record of closing deals and meeting sales targets

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills

- Experience using CRM tools and managing sales pipelines

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote setup

- Strong problem-solving skills and a client-focused mindset





Key Responsibilities:

- Respond to inquiries via
, phone, and messaging platforms in a timely and professional manner

- Qualify and nurture leads by understanding client needs, preferences, and budget

- Present real estate packages and investment opportunities to potential clients

- Follow up consistently and manage the sales pipeline to convert leads into closed deals

- Maintain accurate records of client interactions and updates in the CRM system

- Collaborate with internal teams and provide insights to improve sales strategies and client experience



Again, this position is project-based. You will only work if there are leads that need to be contacted.



APPLY ONLY IF YOU HAVE REAL ESTATE WORK EXPERIENCE



Send us the link to your resume. Qualified applicants will be contacted and will proceed to the interview.

title: 3D/2D Mechanical Designer
description:

Must be able to read P&ID's and be able to contribute to designs and development, not just take instruction.

title: Experienced Amazon FBA Product Researcher  for OA (UK Market)
description:
Experienced Amazon FBA Product Researcher  for OA (UK Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week, with some UK overlap)

Salary: 35,000 PHP + performance-based incentives after successful completion of a 3-month probation period

Start Date: ASAP

________________________________________

About Us

We are a multi-million pound Amazon UK FBA business specialising in the beauty category through Online Arbitrage and Wholesale.

We’re a small, focused team based in the UK and the Philippines, working closely together to drive consistent growth. We value reliability, attention to detail, teamwork, and a positive working environment, and we’re looking for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with us.

________________________________________

Who We’re Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced Product Researcher / Price Analyst who:

• Has at least 1 year of Amazon FBA sourcing experience (UK market preferred) 

• Is reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent 

• Communicates clearly and works well within a team 

• Takes full ownership and accountability for their performance and results 

• Is proactive in flagging issues and suggesting improvements 

• Has a positive attitude and willingness to learn and grow 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

???? Product Research

• Source profitable products for Amazon UK using methods such as manual sourcing, storefront stalking, reverse sourcing, and deal sourcing 

• Analyse deals using tools such as Keepa, SellerBoard, BuyBotPro, and internal systems 

• Meet daily and weekly spend targets while maintaining strong ROI 

• Identify restock opportunities and flag potential issues early 

________________________________________





???? Price Analysis

• Monitor listings to maintain competitive pricing and healthy margins 

• Track Buy Box trends and competitor activity 

• Recommend pricing adjustments based on market conditions and performance 

• Identify underperforming SKUs and suggest improvements 

________________________________________

???? Collaboration

• Communicate proactively with tea
mbers in the UK and Philippines 

• Escalate issues or uncertainties in a timely manner 

• Contribute to improving sourcing processes and workflows 

________________________________________

What We Offer

• A supportive and friendly team environment 

• A stable, long-term role within a growing business 

• Opportunity to develop your skills and increase earnings over time 

• A culture that values respect, teamwork, and work-life balance 

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please send the following to 

1. Your CV 

2. A short cover letter explaining why you’re a good fit 

3. (Optional) A 1–2 minute introduction video 

4. Completed test task 



FINAL TEST TASK – PREMIUM PRODUCT SCENARIOS

Instructions to Candidate

You are given three product scenarios below.

For each product, please answer:

1. Would you consider this a good product to purchase? (Yes/No) 

2. Why or why not? 

3. What risks do you see? 

4. Which product would you prioritise and why? 

5. If you d
 to proceed with a product, how many units would you recommend purchasing initially?

???? Please explain your reasoning clearly.

________________________________________

???? Product A 

• Amazon selling price: £39.99 

• Buy price: £28.00 

• Estimated Amazon fees: £6.50 

• Estimated profit per unit: £5.49 

• Estimated ROI: ~19% 

• Estimated monthly sales: 70 units 

• Estimated sales for our store: 6–9 units/month 

• Number of sellers: 4 ? decreased from 7 in last 60 days 

Buy Box (last 90 days):

• Stable between £38.99 – £41.99 

• No major drops 

• Buy Box rotates between 2–3 consistent sellers 

________________________________________



???? Product B

• Amazon selling price: £34.99 

• Buy price: £26.50 

• Estimated Amazon fees: £6.80 

• Estimated profit per unit: £1.69 

• Estimated ROI: ~6% 

• Estimated monthly sales: 90 units 

• Estimated sales for our store: 5–8 units/month 

• Number of sellers: 10 ? increased from 5 in last 30 days 

Buy Box (last 90 days):

• Fluctuating between £32.99 – £35.99 

• Several drops below £33.00 

• Buy Box shared across many sellers 

________________________________________

???? Product C 

• Amazon selling price: £44.99 

• Buy price: £31.00 

• Estimated Amazon fees: £7.20 

• Estimated profit per unit: £6.79 

• Estimated ROI: ~22% 

• Estimated monthly sales: 60 units 

• Estimated sales for our store: 4–7 units/month 

• Number of sellers: 3 ? increased to 6 in last 30 days 

Buy Box (last 90 days):

• Previously stable at £44.99 

• Last 30 days dropped to £39.99 – £41.99 

• New sellers entering and undercutting

title: Video Editor for Supplement Brand Meta Ads
description:
IMPORTANT: Applicants that do not fill in the form listed below will not be considered.



Dear applicant,



We are looking for a video editor for one of our Supplement brands selling in the Big 5 English speaking countries.



You will be responsible for editing video ads using scripts we provide, and video ad concept examples from competitors.



The ads you will mainly be creating are AI UGC ads, and AI Voice-over VSL's with B-roll sourced from the internet and/or generated with AI.



We provide all the tools you may need such as Elevenlabs for voiceovers, Heygen for AI UGC, and seed-dance, Kling, etc. for video generation.



What we ask of you:



You have edited Meta video ads before, preferably for supplement brands.



You have experience with making AI UGC using Heygen or other AI video generation tools.



You have experience using Elevenlabs for AI voice-overs.



You are comfortable with an editing platform such as Capcut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects.



You know how to source B-roll footage from the internet by using platforms such as TikTok/Instagram.



You can retain user attention by adding in B-roll (video/images) throughout the video.



Keep in mind, we are hiring an A-player for a long term position, this is a position where you are able to grow rapidly in both salary and work load. If you are looking for a quick one week gig, this is not the job for you.



Salary and workload:

The starting rate for the trial period is $5-10 per creative, depending on experience. This will be discussed during the interview.

The workload in your trial period is going to be 2-3 creatives a day.

Meaning your starting salary can already be around $1,000 USD a month.



Keep in mind Both salary and workload can rapidly increase once we see you are able to successfully create winning ads, and we give out bonuses regularly.



If this sounds like you, please fill in the form below, we would love to have you join our team.

description:
Best Body is a highly regarded Reformer Pilates and wellness brand in Australia, and we’re looking for a Philippines based, remote Member Success Consultant to help us change lives every day.

You’ll be the warm, caring voice and heart behind our brand – treating every member like a long?lost friend, answering calls,
s and chats with professionalism and heart, and surprising and delighting people at every opportunity. You’ll help members understand their memberships and classes, solve problems quickly, and keep our systems and records up to date so we can deliver a truly WOW experience at scale.



You’ll be great at this role if you:

Love talking to people and making them feel seen, supported and welcomed.

Enjoy learning, embracing change and being part of a positive, supportive team.

Full?time Member Success Consultant, reporting to our Member Success Team Leader.

Work includes member support (calls,
, chat), data entry in our operating systems, and collaborating with our studio support and marketing teams.

description:
You will be responsible for editing short-form video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok, creating AI-generated videos and animations using tools like Sora, Runway, Pika, or similar, writing original ad scripts as well as executing scripts we provide, and adapting to multiple creative styles depending on the campaign.

title: Ecommerce Executive VA – P&L, Supplier Connections, Email & Store Management
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a skilled and reliable Ecommerce Executive Virtual Assistant to join our fast-growing team. This is a high-responsibility role that requires experience in managing day-to-day ecom operations, maintaining supplier relationships, tracking profitability, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



Responsibilities:



Oversee daily Profit & Loss (P&L) reporting and performance tracking



Maintain and monitor supplier relationships — ensure smooth communication and timely fulfillment



Track COGS daily, verify invoices, and double-check that we are not being overcharged or billed incorrectly



Manage and organize
 communications (customer support, suppliers, logistics, etc.)



Monitor store health, flag issues, and support backend operations (Shopify or similar platforms)



Coordinate product updates, pricing changes, and bundle offers as directed



Identify and troubleshoot any inconsistencies in orders, charges, or fulfillment



Support other ecommerce tasks as needed — your job is to keep things clean, smooth, and profitable



Requirements:



Fluent English communication — must be able to speak and write clearly and confidently



Proven experience in ecommerce operations, virtual assistance, or backend store management



Strong understanding of P&L and COGS tracking



Detail-oriented — must spot small issues before they become big problems



Experience working with suppliers (Alibaba, agents, 3PLs, etc.)



Familiar with ecommerce platforms (Shopify preferred)



Proactive, organized, and trustworthy



Bonus if you have:



Experience with dispute management, order chargebacks, or customer refund audits



Knowledge of basic ad reporting or Klaviyo/email flows



Google Sheets/Excel skills for tracking and reporting



This is a remote role with flexible hours, but you must be available for check-ins and able to communicate daily via Slack or similar platforms.

description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

If you are highly organized, schedule-driven, and comfortable coordinating field operations, we encourage you to apply.

title: Bookkeeper / Finance Staff
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our Finance team at Sendex Limited. You'll be responsible for managing daily client invoicing, recording payments, and maintaining accurate financial records across multiple client accounts.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Invoice Management

Record and send daily invoices to clients via Slack, upload invoice files to the company drive, and maintain accurate records in the Sendex Customer Balances Sheet — verifying amounts, dates, and currencies (EUR, USD, GBP) before closing.

Payment Recording & Reconciliation

Log into Payoneer to record incoming client payments, match payments to invoices, and ensure all paid invoices are properly marked. Record proof-of-payment submissions from clients and send acknowledgment messages using approved templates in French.



Custom Invoice Processing

Handle client requests for custom invoices by submitting the appropriate Airtable form with accurate billing details.



Payment Follow-Up

Monitor outstanding balances, flag overdue accounts, send timely payment reminders via client Slack channels, and escalate unresolved accounts when necessary.



Weekly Reporting

Send End-of-Week balance updates to clients every Saturday. Prepare and distribute the Payoneer & Client Summary Report every Tuesday and Friday, including Payoneer balance figures and Top 5 clients with the highest outstanding balances.



Sheet & Record Maintenance

Keep the Sendex Customer Balances Sheet updated daily, maintain individual client balance tracking sheets, apply correct tab color-coding for account status, and ensure all formulas and data imports are functioning correctly.



New Client Onboarding

Request billing information from new clients using the approved French-language template and record their details in the customer information database.



Requirements

Experience in bookkeeping, accounts receivable, or a similar finance role

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in data entry

Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel), including formulas and multi-tab workbooks

Familiarity with Payoneer or similar payment platforms is a plus

Ability to communicate professionally in both English and French (written)

Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

Comfortable using Slack as a primary communication tool





Work Setup

Remote / Work from Home

Reports to the Finance Supervisor / Finance Lead

Recurring weekly deadlines (Tuesday, Friday, and Saturday deliverables)



Apply Now — Skip the Line!

For faster processing, please apply directly using this link:





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant - Nomad Cruise
description:
Join the team behind Nomad Cruise, a floating conference that brings 300+ digital nomads together for community, learning, and adventure across the world's oceans.



About Nomad Cruise

Nomad Cruise is more than an event - it's a global community. We host immersive cruises that combine inspiring talks, workshops, and unforgettable on-shore adventures, creating deep connections between remote professionals from all over the world. Our core values are community, adventure, and inspiration, and everything we do is designed to reflect them.



The Role

We're looking for a Social Media VA who genuinely enjoys the craft of social media- someone who understands tone, and keeps things consistent. You'll be the voice behind our channels day-to-day, helping us stay active, engaged, and on-brand.

Your work will reach thousands of nomads around the world and directly shape how they experience the Nomad Cruise community online.



What You'll Do



Video & Content Editing

Edit short-form video content (Reels, Stories, clips) and assist with graphics or visual assets — taking raw material from the team and turning it into polished, publish-ready content.



Community Management

Respond to comments, DMs, and mentions across Instagram and other platforms — keeping our community warm, active, and engaged in a tone that feels human and on-brand.



Content Scheduling & Coordination

Help plan and schedule posts using our content calendar, coordinating with the team to keep channels consistent and active.



Caption Writing & Ideation

Write captions, suggest content ideas, and repurpose existing material to keep our feeds fresh and our voice consistent.





The Details:

Based in Manila, Philippines

Part-time, remote

5–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule

Long-term opportunity - with the right fit, we're looking for someone to grow with us



Why You'll Love It



Work with a globally minded, purpose-driven team

Your content reaches nomads and travellers worldwide

Fully remote and flexible schedule

Gain behind-the-scenes insight into a unique international event and community



This Role Is For You If You're…



Based in Manila, Philippines

A natural communicator with a friendly, professional tone

Organised and consistent — you don't let things slip

Experienced with short-form video editing (Reels, CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Familiar with Instagram,
, and basic scheduling tools

Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

Proactive - you flag issues and bring ideas without being asked



How to Apply

Please complete our short application form to get started. As part of your application, include a media kit or portfolio with examples of your work - edited videos or Reels, accounts you've managed, or content you've created.

We'll also ask you to record a short 1-minute video telling us what excites you about this role. No need for perfection - we just want to get a sense of who you are.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Looking forward to hearing from you,

Emilia 

Project & Partnership Manager, Nomad Cruise

title: Video Upscaling Assistant (Topaz AI)
description:
Hello!



We are looking for a reliable assistant to handle video upscaling using Topaz AI. We have an active subscription and have already tested the workflow—your role will be to upload videos, apply the required model and settings, and export the final output.



Responsibilities:



1. Upload provided videos into Topaz AI

2. Apply specified upscaling settings

3. Export and monitor rendering until completion

4. Upload the now upscaled video on google drive or dropbox (storage already provided by us)



Requirements (PC Specs):



1. Dedicated GPU (NVIDIA RTX series preferred, e.g., RTX 3060 or higher)

2. Minimum 16GB RAM (32GB recommended for smoother performance)

3. Modern multi-core CPU (Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 or better)

4. SSD storage for faster processing and file handling

5. Stable system capable of running long render sessions (3–5 hours per video)

6. Reliable internet connection (preferably 500mbps or higher) 



Compensation:



$5 per video

Approximately 3 videos per week (can be increase)



This is a simple, plug-and-play process with clear instructions provided. If you're interested and have the required setup, let us know—we’d love to work with you.

title: B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist
description:
B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist

Full-Time

$600 / month

$800 after 3 months



About Us

Trustyfy is a global technology company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time since the invention of modern banking, customers, not banks, can have full ownership of their money.

Through our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized infrastructure, businesses can operate globally without payment delays and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banking systems. Workers can remit funds to their families with minimal fees, and billions of unbanked individuals gain access to financial independence.

We are not just building the future of finance. We are building technology that creates real-world impact.

Our vision is validated through strong recurring revenue and a successful seed round, and we are now scaling our global team to support the next phase of growth.

Why Your Role Matters

As a B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist, you will help business clients confidently navigate crypto transactions and blockchain workflows. Your ability to combine excellent customer service with technical accuracy will ensure clients can securely send, receive, and verify digital funds while trusting Trustyfy’s infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

Provide exceptional support to users and business clients via
, chat, and phone, ensuring prompt and accurate issue resolution.





Educate and guide users on interacting with decentralized applications (DApps) and using crypto wallets securely, including tools such as MetaMask.





Assist clients with sending, receiving, and verifying crypto transactions, including transaction validation using explorers such as Etherscan.





Troubleshoot issues related to blockchain networks, wallet integrations, and decentralized applications.





Collaborate with technical and product teams to escalate and resolve complex cases.





Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, technical concerns, and service recommendations.

Skills and Experience

Experience: Minimum of 2 years in customer service, technical support, or client success, ideally within fintech, Web3, or blockchain environments.





Technical Knowledge: Familiarity with crypto wallets, blockchain transactions, and DApps. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new Web3 tools.





Customer Service Skills: Strong communication, empathy, and client-focused problem-solving abilities.





Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts.





Problem Solving: Strong troubleshooting and analytical thinking skills with high attention to detail.





Work Ethic: Highly reliable, self-motivated, and capable of working independently in a remote environment.





Availability:

Schedule Options: UK, US or AUS timezones

Must be open to working on weekends

40 hours per week, 5 working days



Salary

YOUR PAYMENT IS FIXED AND GUARANTEED. This means you will be paid even if workload temporarily fluctuates (although consistent workload is expected).



To apply for this position, please write in the subject line:

“I am a B2B Crypto Customer Support Specialist [Name + Surname]”

title: Customer Service Representative (Voice Only | Remote | Philippines) US-Based Company | Long-Term Role | Full-Time
description:
Read This Before You Apply

This role is 100% voice-based. Every shift, you will be on the phone handling outbound and/or inbound calls for US clients. If you are looking for a chat,
, or non-voice position, this is not the role for you. We are only interested in hearing from serious, long-term candidates who are fully committed to a professional voice career.

Applications submitted without a voice recording will be automatically rejected no exceptions.



About the Role

We are a US-based company building a reliable, high-performing remote team in the Philippines. We are looking for Customer Service Representatives who are ready to grow with us for the long haul. This is a permanent, full-time position we are not hiring for temporary projects or part-time arrangements.

As a CSR, you will serve as the direct voice of our company to US customers and clients. You will handle live calls throughout your entire shift whether outbound, inbound, or both depending on account assignments. You must be comfortable being on the phone consistently, without extended breaks from calls.



Key Responsibilities

Handle outbound and/or inbound calls professionally and courteously throughout every shift

Communicate clearly and confidently with English-speaking US clients and customers

Follow call scripts, workflows, and account-specific guidelines

Accurately document call outcomes and customer information

Consistently meet performance benchmarks and attendance standards

Adapt to different accounts and campaign types as business needs evolve





Schedule

Shifts are aligned to US time zones (Eastern, Central, Mountain, or Pacific)

Expect to work afternoon to overnight Philippine time

Exact days and hours depend on client and account assignment

Schedule flexibility is a strong advantage accounts may rotate



Training & Onboarding

Paid training provided before going live

Full support throughout onboarding to set you up for success

First 30 days is a probationary period

Salary increases available after probation based on performance and attendance



Who We're Looking For

We want people who are in this for the long term agents who show up, perform consistently, and grow with the company as new accounts open. If you have a history of job-hopping, inconsistent attendance, or are looking for temporary income, please do not apply.



Requirements:

Fluent, clear spoken and written English non-negotiable

Proven ability to handle high volumes of live phone calls

Reliable, stable internet connection (wired connection strongly preferred)

Computer running Windows 11 Pro

Noise-cancelling headset

Quiet, dedicated home workspace suitable for professional calls — free from background noise and interruptions

Ability to commit fully to a US-hour night shift on a long-term basis

Strong attendance record and professional work ethic

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently without supervision



Compensation

Starting salary: ?26,500/month, paid bi-weekly

Salary increase opportunities after the 30-day probation period based on productivity and attendance

Room to grow as additional accounts become available





How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit both of the following:



Your CV/Resume

A voice recording introducing yourself and demonstrating your spoken English communication skills



Applications missing either the CV or the voice recording will not be reviewed no exceptions.

In your voice recording, briefly introduce yourself, describe your call center or customer service experience.

We are hiring selectively. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



If you are reliable, professional, and serious about building a long-term remote career in voice-based customer service we want to hear from you.

title: OUTBOUND CAMPAIGN OPERATOR — COLD EMAIL & DELIVERABILITY
description:
OUTBOUND CAMPAIGN OPERATOR — COLD
 & DELIVERABILITY



**Please read requirements carefully before applying**



Lead Searchers is a specialist outbound growth firm helping UK service companies generate high-value commercial opportunities through targeted cold
 campaigns.



We work primarily with UK B2B service industries, helping them secure early conversations with decision-makers.



Our campaigns are built to generate real revenue conversations while protecting domain reputation and long-term deliverability.



We are now hiring an Outbound Campaign Operator to own campaign execution and performance.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is not a support role.



You will be responsible for running outbound cold
 campaigns end-to-end, from data through to booked meetings.



Your role is to ensure campaigns are well targeted, technically sound, and continuously improving.



Over time, the goal is for you to fully own the operational side of outbound, allowing the founder to focus on sales and growth.



You will be expected to identify issues, suggest improvements, and take responsibility for results.



CORE SKILLS

 Campaign Management

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

DATA & TARGETING

- job titles

DELIVERABILITY & DOMAIN HEALTH (CRITICAL)

CAMPAIGN SETUP & MANAGEMENT

Manage sending schedules and inbox distribution

Monitor campaign performance and make adjustments



TESTING & OPTIMISATION

Run A/B tests on subject lines and messaging

Analyse open, reply, and positive response rates

Identify improvements and implement changes



REPLY HANDLING & QUALIFICATION

Categorise responses accurately

Identify qualified opportunities

SYSTEMS & REPORTING

Maintain clean CRM and tracking systems

Provide clear visibility on campaign performance



TOOLS

You should have experience with some of:



Smartlead or Instantly

Apollo or similar data tools

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

 verification tools

Google Sheets / data management



Bonus:

Clay

Advanced deliverability tools



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong understanding of cold
 campaign mechanics

Experience managing outbound campaigns end-to-end

High attention to detail, especially with data

Ability to work independently and take ownership

Comfortable identifying and solving problems

Awareness of deliverability and domain health



THIS ROLE IS NOT

A basic VA position

A copywriting role

A task-only execution role

Not suitable for candidates who require constant instruction or supervision



You will be expected to think, improve, and take responsibility for outcomes.



STRUCTURE

Remote

Initially part-time

Flexible hours

Opportunity to grow into a long-term operator role



COMPENSATION

Monthly retainer based on experience and capability

Performance-based bonuses tied to campaign results and meeting generation



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



Your experience managing cold
 campaigns

Tools you have used
