* Performing basic AR and AP functions

* Monthly/Quarterly/Year end closings, overseeing and preparing for periodic financial closings.

* Reconciliations: Regularly reconciling bank statements, credit cards, and other accounts.

* Familiarity with tax filing processes and working with tax professionals



You're a Great Fit If You:



- Have 3+ years of bookkeeping experience, ideally in an eCommerce environment

- Are proficient in QuickBooks Online (QBO certification is a plus)

- Understand COGS, inventory accounting, and payment processor reconciliations

- Are a self-starter who communicates proactively and meets deadlines without hand-holding

- CPA or CB 



Why Join Us



- 100% remote — work from anywhere

- Flexible schedule — we care about results, not hours logged

- High-autonomy culture with a collaborative, supportive team

- Stable, long-term engagement with room to grow



To apply, please answer these questions:

1. How many eCommerce businesses have you worked with in the past and what types of products did they sell?

2. For your highest-volume client, roughly how many transactions did you handle per month — and what was their approximate monthly revenue? If you handled multiple clients, feel free to share the range.

5. Tell us about a time you caught or fixed a significant bookkeeping error. What happened and how did you handle it?

title: Operations-Focused Virtual Assistant (Project-Based, Multi-Project)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are building a small but growing portfolio of structured digital projects and are assembling a long-term VA operations pool.

This is not a full-time role and not tied to a single project.

Instead, we work with VAs who:

Follow instructions precisely

Are comfortable moving between different projects

Prefer clear scope over creative freedom

Can deliver clean, correct work with minimal supervision

If selected, you may be invited to short, well-defined tasks across multiple projects over time.



HOW WORK IS STRUCTURED

All projects in this portfolio share the same operating principles:

Clear written instructions

Fixed scope and deliverables

Tight constraints (no guessing, no improvising)

Emphasis on clarity, accuracy, and trust

Fast feedback cycles

No client calls

No selling, promising, or defending

Projects may involve documentation, setup, cleanup, posting, auditing, delivery, or coordination work depending on fit.

You will not be asked to redesign projects, invent strategies, or “make it better” unless explicitly instructed.



THIS ROLE IS A FIT IF YOU:

Prefer executing defined tasks over open-ended brainstorming

Are comfortable asking questions only when blocked

Can flag unclear instructions instead of guessing

Respect boundaries, tone rules, and scope

Are open to working on different projects over time

Value consistency and correctness over speed or creativity



THIS ROLE IS NOT A FIT IF YOU:

Want to specialize in one specific niche or project only

Prefer creative freedom or “adding your own ideas”

Need constant feedback or reassurance

Want to manage strategy, direction, or decision-making

Are looking for guaranteed hours or a fixed long-term role



COMPENSATION & TIME

Hourly, project-based

Rates vary by role and responsibility (typically $4–9 USD/hr)

Short-term tasks with potential for repeat work

No minimum hours guaranteed

Strong performers are added to our internal VA pool and contacted directly for future work.



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)

Do not reply to this job post.

All applicants must apply through this form:



The form is the first screen.

Incomplete or low-effort submissions will not be reviewed. 



List any specific system competencies in the artifacts section (GHL, Canva, Microsoft Word, 
, etc.)



Please read the form instructions carefully and answer based on the role type you are best suited for.



FINAL NOTE

We are intentionally selective.

If you enjoy structured work, clear expectations, and operating inside well-defined systems, this will be a good fit.

If not, this is probably not the right environment for you — and that’s okay.

Thank you for applying carefully.

What We Offer

Full-time position

Ideal Candidate



You are not just a developer—you are a problem solver and system thinker who can:

Design what comes next

s sent

title: Video Editor
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian digital marketing and media production agency. We create high-quality content for a range of clients — from social media campaigns and brand videos to long-form content and digital advertising. We are a team that cares about the craft, not just the output. Every frame matters to us, and we want a Video Editor who feels the same way.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Video Editor based in the Philippines to join our remote team on a full-time basis. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow alongside a creative agency and become a genuine part of the team.



The Role



As our Video Editor, you will work on a variety of content projects — social media short-form clips, brand videos, testimonials, ad creatives, and more. Your primary tool is DaVinci Resolve, and you need to know it deeply: colour grading, audio mixing, multi-cam editing, transitions, text animations, and exports. You will collaborate closely with our Australian team, attend regular video check-ins, and bring a strong sense of visual storytelling to everything you produce.



What We Provide



We set our editors up for success. You will receive access to Higgsfield AI for enhanced video production, free mentoring calls with senior team members, ready-to-use assets and templates, and ongoing support to develop your skills. We invest in the people we work with.



• Access to Higgsfield AI — provided by AXIS for your productions

• Regular one-on-one and group mentoring calls at no cost to you

• Pre-built asset libraries, templates, and motion resources

• Clear briefs and a structured workflow so you always know what is expected

• A collaborative, feedback-driven team environment where your craft is respected



Key Responsibilities



• Edit short-form and long-form video content to a high professional standard using DaVinci Resolve

• Colour grade footage to match brand look and feel, or as directed

• Mix and clean audio tracks including voiceover, music, and ambient sound

• Create and apply motion graphics, text animations, and lower thirds within DaVinci Resolve

• Export and deliver files to the correct specs for each platform (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, web, etc.)

• Attend virtual team meetings on Mondays and Wednesdays, with availability for Friday check-ins as required

• Collaborate via Slack for day-to-day communication and updates

• Manage and organise project files within Google Drive and ClickUp

• Use Claude (AI assistant) as directed to support workflows and efficiency

• Take creative direction, incorporate feedback, and revise work in a timely manner

• Maintain consistent output quality across multiple concurrent projects



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Minimum 2–3 years of professional video editing experience

• Expert-level proficiency in DaVinci Resolve — you must hold the paid (Studio) version

• Strong understanding of colour grading, audio mixing, and post-production workflow

• A genuine passion for the craft of editing — you understand pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

• Full-time availability — you are dedicated to this role and not juggling multiple full-time commitments

• Reliable internet connection and a capable editing workstation

• Comfortable working in English — written and spoken communication with the Australian team

• Familiarity with ClickUp for task and project management

• Familiarity with Slack for team communication

• Working knowledge of Google Drive for file storage and sharing

• Basic familiarity with Claude (AI assistant) or willingness to learn



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with Higgsfield AI or similar AI-assisted video tools

• Motion graphics experience in Fusion (built into DaVinci Resolve)

• Experience editing for Australian or Western-market brands

• Photography or cinematography background

• Short-form social media content editing experience (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)



Team Structure & Meetings



You will work closely with the AXIS team and be a genuine part of our production workflow. We run structured team check-ins twice a week on Mondays and Wednesdays, with an optional third session on Fridays when project load requires it. These are short, focused meetings — not lengthy sit-ins. We use these to align on priorities, share feedback, and keep projects moving.

Outside of meetings, the team communicates through Slack. We expect you to be responsive during working hours, take creative feedback constructively, and flag any issues early. We are a collaborative team that respects each other’s time and expertise.



Pay Structure



Editing projects are paid at a rate of AUD $30–$80 per video, based on the complexity, length, and requirements of each edit. More involved projects requiring colour grading, motion graphics, and multi-track audio are compensated at the higher end of the range. Clear briefs will always outline the expected scope before work begins.

We value quality over speed, and we price accordingly. If you are the right fit and your work consistently delivers, there is real potential for long-term, ongoing work with increasing volume.



Who We Are Looking For



We are not looking for a button-pusher. We want someone who loves editing — who thinks about why a cut works, who cares about how audio feels, and who sees the difference between a mediocre video and a great one. If you have been editing for years and still feel excited when a project comes together, you are the kind of person we want.

You need to be reliable, self-managed, and comfortable working asynchronously with an Australian team. You take feedback well, communicate clearly, and approach your work with professionalism and pride.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Your updated resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile

• A showreel or portfolio of video work — links to edited videos you have produced (required)

• Confirmation that you use DaVinci Resolve Studio (paid version)

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your editing background and why this role interests you

• Your typical working hours and availability



Applications without a portfolio or showreel will not be considered.



We look forward to seeing your work.



— The AXIS Media Group Team

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Social Media Content Creator & Strategist
description:
Ascend Group is a fully remote digital marketing company. We exist to equip entrepreneurs and purpose-driven businesses to thrive in the new AI economy through strategic marketing, education, and scalable systems with AI-first thinking.





At Ascend, we are a remote-first team of A-players who value growth, performance, and transparency. We move fast, build with clarity, and honor each tea
mber’s ideas, ownership, and craft. If you want to expand your capabilities, contribute meaningfully, and grow in a no-politics, high-performance environment, this is your place.





We're on a mission to amplify our brand presence and build meaningful connections across multiple social media platforms, with Instagram as a key priority. As our Social Media Content Creator & Strategist, your role goes beyond creating content; you’ll be driving impactful engagement, growing our Instagram following, and turning audiences into loyal advocates. We’re looking for someone passionate about digital storytelling, strategic in content planning, and seasoned in managing and scaling Instagram accounts, all while being relentless in the pursuit of excellence.





IMPORTANT NOTE: Only those who have completed and submitted the job application form properly via the link below will be considered for the role.







APPLY NOW and FILL IN this APPLICATION FORM: 
/AG-JobApplicationForm







Role Objectives:



- Elevate Brand Presence: Develop and execute a cohesive social media strategy that amplifies our brand voice across platforms, with a focus on creating a compelling narrative that resonates with our target audience.

- Drive Engagement and Growth: Take ownership of growing our social media footprint. Your goal is to turn creative content into viral sensations, driving a significant increase in followers, engagement, and ultimately, brand loyalty.

- Innovate and Adapt: Stay ahead of the curve by identifying emerging trends and adapting our content strategy to leverage these opportunities. You’ll be expected to continually test new formats and ideas to optimize our social media performance.

- Strategic Content Creation: Produce and oversee the creation of short-form viral videos and other engaging content that not only captures attention but also converts viewers into engaged community members.

- Data-Driven Decisions: Use insights from social media analytics to inform strategy and content creation. Your ability to interpret data and adjust tactics will be key to driving continuous improvement.

- Collaborative Leadership: Work closely with the marketing team to align social media efforts with broader campaign objectives, ensuring that our content strategy supports and enhances overall marketing initiatives.





Requirements:



- 5+ years of experience in strategizing and creating social media content, with a strong focus on managing Instagram accounts and growing follower engagement.

- Create, manage, and oversee the production of compelling short-form viral videos, effectively coordinating with all stakeholders.

- Identify and analyze viral video trends, recommending 20-30 repurposing ideas weekly.

Repurpose long-form videos into engaging short-form content for various social media platforms.

- Drive independent initiatives, taking ownership of key results to grow TikTok, Instagram, and other social media platform followers.

- Research and suggest viral formats for continual testing and optimal engagement.

- Craft attention-grabbing viral copies and design visually appealing images.

- Break down social media data to derive insights and test hypotheses for improved performance.

- Develop and execute a viral social media strategy tailored for each platform.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to generate product marketing campaigns with social media content.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest social media trends and best practices, making recommendations for integration into strategies.

- Plan and manage the social media calendar for up to a quarter.





Please note that only those who have completed and submitted the job application form will be considered for the role.

title: Solar Administrator / Solar Engineer (Australia)
description:
Join Australia’s leading solar support team!



We’re looking for an experienced Solar Admin Assistant to join our growing offshore team. You’ll be supporting Australian solar companies with everything from grid connection applications to STC submissions — helping streamline their operations and keep installs moving smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:

- Process STC forms and manage compliance documentation.

- Submit and track GridConnect pre-approvals and connection applications with various DNSPs across Australia.

- Send out handover kits via Pylon, OpenSolar, or other platforms as required.

- Manage job records, checklists, and customer data for multiple clients.

- Liaise professionally with Australian installers, office staff, and customers as needed.

- Work across multiple clients and adapt quickly to their systems and processes.



Advantage experience to handle:



Commercial Solar Administration

- Manage DNSP grid connection applications for commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Prepare and submit pre-approval applications

- Respond to DNSP technical queries and requests for additional information

- Manage export limits, zero-export requirements, and protection conditions

- Upload and manage documentation across DNSP portals



Solar + Battery Projects

- Support commercial battery approvals and documentation

- Ensure batteries are included correctly in DNSP approvals and SLDs

- Manage commissioning evidence and compliance documentation

- Coordinate with installers to resolve approval or documentation gaps



Compliance & Documentation



Review and manage:

- Single Line Diagrams (SLDs)

- CEC-compliant documentation

- Installer and designer accreditation evidence

- Commissioning photos and reports

- Prepare STC documentation for commercial systems

- Package compliance folders for audit readiness



Liaise with:

- Australian installers and electricians

- STC traders

- Retailers and DNSPs 

- Track job status, approvals, and outstanding actions

- Flag risks, delays, or compliance issues early and escalate appropriately



Requirements:



- Direct experience working with Australian solar companies



Hands-on experience with:

- Grid connection applications

- STCs for commercial solar

- Australian DNSP portals



A solid understanding of:

- Export limits and DNSP pre-approval requirements

- Solar + battery integration fundamentals

- Clean Energy Council (CEC) compliance frameworks



Essential:

- Experience across multiple Australian states

- Experience managing commercial metering coordination

- Familiarity with CRMs such as Pylon, OpenSolar, ServiceM8, or similar

- Experience supporting mid-to-high volume solar installers

- Customer service or technical solar knowledge is highly essential



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- AU time zone working hours (no graveyard shifts)

- We’re a passionate, forward-thinking team (and genuinely good humans)

- Growth opportunities as we expand

- Supportive culture where initiatives and ideas are celebrated

title: Purchasing Agent / Specialist-WFH
description:
Job Summary

The Purchasing Agent / Specialist is responsible for procuring goods and

services—ranging from raw materials and equipment to office supplies—at the most

competitive prices without sacrificing quality. This role involves managing vendor

relationships, negotiating contracts, and analyzing market trends to maintain a lean and

efficient supply chain.

Key Responsibilities

? Sourcing & Procurement: Identify and evaluate potential suppliers based on

price, quality, service, and reliability.

? Negotiation: Draft and negotiate contracts, including pricing, delivery schedules,

and payment terms to maximize value.

? Purchase Order Management: Prepare, process, and track purchase orders

(POs) through the entire lifecycle to ensure timely delivery.

? Vendor Relations: Maintain strong relationships with existing vendors and

conduct regular performance reviews to ensure compliance with SLAs.

? Market Analysis: Monitor industry trends and price fluctuations to anticipate

supply shifts or cost-saving opportunities.

? Inventory Coordination: Work closely with the warehouse and production

teams to ensure stock levels are optimized and avoid shortages.

? Compliance & Records: Maintain accurate records of purchases, pricing, and

inventory while ensuring all activities meet company and legal standards.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Feature Requirement

Education Bachelor’s degree in Business, Supply Chain Management, or a



related field.



Experience 2–5 years of experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain.

Technical

Skills



Proficiency in ERP software (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite) and Microsoft

Excel.



Soft Skills Strong negotiation, analytical thinking, and time-management skills.

Certifications CPSM (Certified Professional in Supply Management) or CPP



(Certified Purchasing Professional) is a plus.

title: CapCut / TikTok Editor
description:
Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

* Cutting dead space in talking head videos

* Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

* Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

* Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:



1. Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





2. Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.



A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





You will be working hand in hand with me on a social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

* Attention to detail

* STRONG English

* Strong internet connection

* Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

* Good working with a team

* Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

* Availability to work 3-5h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

* Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

* Can take payments through Wise

* PH or similar time zone



$300-$400/month + bonuses for 3-5h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max).



Below is a Google drive with the original files, script and video example you will need to re-create:



Google drive: 
  



Please complete the following steps:

Broll:

* Download the files and import into your video editing software

* Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

* Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

* Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

* Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head

* Download the files and import into your video editing software

* Cut out all dead space between videos

* Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

* Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

* Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

* Message me a link to re-create video



Overlay

* Download the files and import into your video editing software

* Cut out all dead space between videos

* Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

* Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

* Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

* Pay attention to overlay position and length

* Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

* Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

* Message me a link to re-create video



Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “purple” so I know you read the instructions.

title: Disposition Manager - Real Estate Investment Company (USA)
description:
We are REI Equity, a leading real estate investment company that helps homeowners sell their properties quickly and efficiently. We are looking for a skilled and proactive Disposition Manager to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for taking signed deals from the acquisition team and ensuring they are brought to the finish line smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage the full lifecycle of real estate deals, from contract signing to closing.

Coordinate with title companies, buyers, and sellers to facilitate smooth transactions.

Oversee documentation, ensure contracts are properly executed, and manage any required follow-up.

Handle any complications or roadblocks in the closing process, including managing tenant situations or repair negotiations.

Provide consistent communication and updates to all parties involved to ensure timely and successful closings.

Work closely with the acquisition team to ensure a seamless handoff of deals.



Qualifications:

Experience in real estate, particularly in disposition or transaction coordination.

Strong organizational and multitasking skills.

Excellent communication abilities with both clients and tea
mbers.

Knowledge of real estate contracts, closing processes, and documentation.

Ability to problem-solve and handle last-minute issues that may arise during a transaction.



What We Offer:

Competitive compensation based on experience.

Flexible work schedule (remote).

Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced and dynamic company.

If you're an experienced disposition or transaction manager looking to work with a leading real estate investment firm, we encourage you to apply!

title: Drafting & Estimating Administrator
description:
Remote Drafting & Estimating Administrator (Construction / Structural Steel)

Full-Time (40 hrs/week) or Part-Time (20 hrs/week)

Work Schedule: Must be available during Australian business hours

Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Brisbane (QLD) time

(Includes 1-hour unpaid lunch break and two paid 15-minute breaks)



About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Drafting & Estimating Administrator to provide back-end technical and administrative support within the mining and construction industry, specifically in structural steel fabrication and construction.



This role is critical in ensuring accurate technical documentation, cost estimation, compliance alignment, and overall project support.



Role Overview



This is a multi-functional technical and administrative support role. You will work closely with project managers and engineers to ensure project documentation, compliance requirements, and cost estimates are prepared accurately and on time.



Key Responsibilities



1. Drafting Support

Prepare and revise technical drawings using AutoCAD, Tekla, or similar software

Interpret structural and fabrication drawings

Assist in producing shop drawings and as-built documentation

Maintain drawing registers and version control

Coordinate revisions based on project or engineering changes

Work with DXF and NC1 files



2. Estimating Support

Assist in preparing cost estimates for structural steel projects

Perform quantity take-offs from drawings

Support material and labour costing

Assist in preparing tender documentation

Maintain estimating records and pricing databases



3. Compliance Support

Assist with WHS documentation and compliance tracking

Maintain contractor compliance registers

Support documentation required for site entry (mining/construction)

Track certifications, licences, and expiry dates



4. Administrative & Data Support

Maintain structured digital filing systems

Ensure accurate data entry across systems

Support invoice tracking and documentation collation

Assist with reporting and document preparation



Required Skills & Experience



Technical

Proven experience in drafting (construction/structural steel preferred)

Experience supporting estimating functions

Proficiency in AutoCAD or similar CAD software

Ability to interpret engineering drawings

Experience in mining or construction environments is highly regarded



Administrative & Compliance

Strong document control experience

Familiarity with construction compliance processes

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organisational skills



Systems & Tools

Microsoft Office / Microsoft 365

Project management or construction software

Cloud-based document management systems



Soft Skills

Strong written communication skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

Proactive and solution-focused mindset

High level of professionalism and confidentiality



Qualifications

Degree in Drafting, Engineering, Construction Management, or related field (preferred)

Minimum 3+ years’ experience in drafting and estimating support roles in Australian businesses

title: SEO Manager Technical & On-Page for a US Company (Remote and Graveyard)
description:
A) SEO Leadership & Site Optimization (90% of role)

Own SEO strategy execution across the site: on-page SEO, technical SEO, and site health.

Troubleshoot ranking issues and implement fixes independently (e.g., keyword cannibalization, indexing issues, Google algorithm updates).

Monitor tools like SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4 for performance, coverage, and errors; implement solutions quickly.

Maintain on-page SEO: update titles/meta, add internal links, refresh stale content, implement FAQ/schema updates.

Optimize site performance: compress/resize images, lazy-load media, minimize render-blocking assets, and improve Core Web Vitals.

Work with AI tools and automation workflows to enhance SEO and content operations.



B) CRM & Workflow Management (Supportive)

Use CRMs (preferably Go High Level, also familiar with Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho) to manage campaigns, leads, and workflows.

Build and maintain automations/workflows for marketing operations.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to align CRM data with SEO and site performance initiatives.



C) Elementor & WordPress Site Management (5–10% of role)

Convert legacy WordPress pages (Classic Editor/HTML) into Elementor using brand-consistent templates and global styles.

Implement technical hygiene during migration: 301 redirects, canonical tags, sitemaps, no-index where appropriate, fix orphan pages.

Stage/publish new pages or updates; QA for design, SEO, accessibility, and SOP compliance.

Basic troubleshooting of front-end issues with HTML/CSS and Elementor.



D) Collaboration, Compliance, & Standards

Follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes meticulously; suggest improvements proactively.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive content with care, particularly in healthcare/behavioral health contexts.

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and represent the brand professionally.

Work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Required Skills & Experience

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, particularly with WordPress sites.

Elementor Pro page-building experience.

Strong on-page and technical SEO fundamentals: site architecture, redirects, canonicals, sitemaps, robots.txt, schema basics.

Experience with SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, and page speed/Core Web Vitals optimization.

Knowledge of Yoast or Rank Math, media optimization, and basic accessibility standards.

Basic HTML/CSS skills for troubleshooting WordPress/Elementor issues.

Organized, detail-driven, and able to follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes.

Clear written communication for documentation and updates.



Nice to Have

Building reusable Elementor templates.

Experience with managed WordPress hosting (WP Engine, 
) and CDNs like Cloudflare.

Familiarity with performance optimization tools (WP Rocket, NitroPack, Screaming Frog, PageSpeed Insights, Looker Studio dashboards).

Experience with healthcare or behavioral health content.



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $9 USD per hour.



Working hours:

4 hours overlap in CST (core collaboration hours).

4 hours fixed Philippine time (must remain consistent each day).

Paid time off: Includes standard US holidays and paid leaves.

Fully remote; virtual collaboration via RingCentral (camera optional except for standups/meetings).

title: DM Setter
description:
We are hiring a high-performance DM Appointment Setter responsible for generating qualified sales calls through direct messaging, lead nurturing, and outbound outreach.



This is not a passive customer support role.



You will be responsible for:



• Starting conversations

• Qualifying leads

• Booking calls

• Increasing show-up rates

• Tracking leads

• Following up relentlessly



Your performance directly drives revenue.



We expect initiative, work ethic, and relentless execution.



This role is for people who are hungry, disciplined, and willing to go above and beyond.



Base Salary $500 / month



Performance Bonus +$10 per SHOWED-UP booked call



If you book 30 calls that show up ? $300 bonus

If you book 50 calls that show up ? $500 bonus



Top performers quickly reach $700–$900/month.



Your income grows directly with your results.



Your mission is simple:



Turn conversations into booked calls.



This means:



• Identifying prospects

• Starting conversations

• Finding their problems

• Qualifying them

• Booking them on a call

• Making sure they show up



The goal is to generate 1–3 booked calls per day once fully trained.



That means:



• 10–15 calls per week

• 40–60 calls per month



Core Responsibilities

1. Daily Outreach Send 80–100+ targeted outreach messages per day.



This includes:



Warm outreach

• Story viewers

• Followers

• Post commenters

• Post likers



Cold outreach

• Competitor followers

• Competitor commenters

• Relevant prospects



You must maintain consistent volume every day.



No excuses.



2. Start Conversations (Not Spam)



Every message must be:



• Human

• Personalised

• Context-based



You must reference something specific:



Examples:



• Their comment on competition 

• Their profile

• Their interest in Amazon

• Their activity on content



Automated-looking messages are not acceptable.



3. Qualify Leads



Your job is to find pain.



Key questions include:



• Are they interested in Amazon FBA?

• Have they tried it before?

• What have they done so far?

• What problems are they facing?



If there is no pain, move on.



You are not here to convince uninterested people.



4. Book Calls



After qualifying leads, your objective is to book a call quickly.



Calls should ideally be booked as soon as possible.



You should aim to convert conversations into calls within:



3–5 messages (warm leads)



Cold leads may take:



8–12 messages because you must build trust first.



5. Increase Show-Up Rate



Booking calls is only half the job. You must ensure people actually show up.



This includes:



• Continuing conversations after booking

• Providing helpful content

• Answering questions

• Building rapport



Target show-up rate: Minimum: 70%. Goal: 90%



6. Follow-Up System



Most prospects will not respond to the first message. Required follow-up sequence:



Message 1 ? wait 2–3 days

Message 2 ? wait 2 days

Message 3 ? final message



After that, archive the conversation. Consistent follow-up is mandatory.



7. Lead Tracking



Every lead must be tracked in a tracking system.



This ensures no lead is lost.



8. Lead Magnet Promotion



You will guide prospects toward:



• Lead magnets

•
 opt-ins

• Educational resources



This helps capture leads even if they don’t book immediately.



9. Workshop Signups



Part of your job includes filling free workshops.



You will invite prospects to:



• Educational sessions

• Training workshops



The goal is to increase lead volume and nurture prospects.



10. TikTok Live Lead Follow-Up



After every TikTok live session you will:



• Identify viewers

• Message engaged participants

• Start conversations

• Convert them into booked calls



Anyone who watched for a long time is considered a warm lead.



Performance Expectations



This is a performance-driven role.



Minimum expectations after training:



Daily

• 80–100 messages sent

• response within 5–15 minutes



Weekly

• 10–15 booked calls



Monthly

• 40–60 booked calls



Training Period



Training lasts 2–4 weeks.



Training includes:



• Reading past DM conversations

• Studying sales calls

• Watching content and videos

• Learning Amazon FBA basics

• Understanding typical customer questions



The goal is to learn the brand voice and communicate naturally.



Required Skills



You must have:



• Excellent written English

• Fast response time

• High attention to detail

• Strong work ethic

• Ability to handle rejection

• Curiosity and willingness to learn



Nice to have - Experience with tracking DMs before and also DM setting 

You must also be able to work independently and proactively.



Work Ethic Expectations



We expect people who go above and beyond.



Top performers:



• Work harder than required

• Reply quickly

• Take initiative

• Improve scripts

• Test new messaging ideas



This role rewards hustle and ownership.

title: Finance & Operations Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a reliable and proactive person to manage the financial operations of our events business.



This role is focused on one thing: making sure all money is tracked, invoiced, collected, and organised properly. You will be responsible for managing Xero, keeping records accurate, and ensuring that nothing is missed.



You will create and send invoices to schools, sponsors, and partners, track all outstanding payments, and follow up consistently until payment is received. You will maintain a simple, clear view of what has been invoiced, what has been paid, and what is still outstanding across multiple events.



You will also support financial workflows across platforms such as Stripe and Airwallex, ensuring all transactions are properly recorded and reconciled.



We are looking for someone with experience using Xero, strong written English, and a high level of organisation and attention to detail. You must be comfortable working independently and taking ownership of your work, including following up on payments in a professional and consistent manner.



This is a full-time remote role. You will work closely with the founder and play a key role in keeping the financial side of the business running cleanly and efficiently.



When applying, please include a short introduction, your experience with Xero, an example of how you have handled invoicing or chasing payments, and your availability.

title: Expert Brand Identity/Logo Designer
description:
We're looking for a skilled brand identity designer to create our visual identity. This includes a primary logo mark and wordmark, color system, typography pairing, dark/light mode variants, and a condensed brand guidelines doc. All final files delivered in SVG, AI.



 We're aiming for the level of polish and precision you see in brands like Whop, bold, geometric, built to scale from a favicon to a full page without losing impact. Not trendy or decorative. Just confident and clean.

Ideal candidate has experience designing identities for platforms or tech companies and understands how a brand system translates into product UI, not just marketing.





You're a fit if you



Have a portfolio with brand identity work at a high level of craft — logos that scale, systems that hold up

Understand how identity translates to product UI, not just marketing materials

Can deliver final assets in SVG, AI, and Figma-ready formats

Have designed for platforms, marketplaces, or tech companies before

Work well async and can communicate rationale behind design decisions

Deliver on time and are responsive during feedback rounds



You will be put to a trial test first to test your capablities. Then you will be given alot of projects at scale.

title: Administrator
description:
Natural Cleaning Experts is a fast-growing U.S.-based cleaning company providing high-quality residential and commercial cleaning services across Texas. We are committed to delivering exceptional customer experiences through professionalism, reliability, and strong operational systems.

Our company operates with structured processes, modern CRM tools, and clear performance standards. We focus on long-term client relationships, consistent service quality, and building a strong, motivated remote team.

As we continue to expand, we are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Administrator who will play a key role in client communication, scheduling coordination, and service sales.



Requirements

1. English level: Upper-Intermediate / Advanced (required).

2. Confident spoken communication with U.S. clients.

3. Strong organizational and multitasking skills.

4. Customer-oriented and results-driven mindset.

5. Confident PC user (CRM systems, messengers, Google tools).

6. Experience in sales or customer service is a plus.



Key Responsibilities

1. Handle incoming client inquiries (calls, messages, online bookings).

2. Communicate confidently with American clients in English.

3. Present and sell company cleaning services.

4. Confirm booking details and schedule appointments.

5. Coordinate cleaning teams and manage daily schedules.

6. Monitor service quality and ensure client satisfaction.

7. Maintain accurate records in CRM (training provided).



What We Offer

1. Fully remote position — work from anywhere in the world.

2. Stable income potential with performance-based bonuses.

3. Career growth opportunities within an international company.

4. Structured onboarding and mentor support (1-week training period, 1–2 hours per day; training is unpaid).

5. Clear career path to Operations Manager.

6. Work in a growing U.S. company with organized systems and long-term vision.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
Marketing & Funnel Assistant (VA – Remote, 20–30 hrs/week)



Please read the FULL brief below before applying. Any applications not submitted correctly will be instantly dismissed. 



About Dream Out Loud



Dream Out Loud is building Australia’s #1 education company for founders and leaders.

We run transformational events and a high-level mastermind that help entrepreneurs build businesses that don’t run on their nervous system.



We move fast, care deeply about impact, and hold a world-class standard for everything we put into the world.

The Opportunity



We’re looking for a Marketing & Funnel Assistant (Virtual Assistant) to support our Head of Marketing with:



Funnel and landing page builds inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

Automations and workflows

 campaign + nurture sequence setup

Basic website updates and coordinating website improvements

This is 20–30 hours per week, long-term, fully remote. You’ll be an important part of a small, high-performing team.



What You’ll Do:



Funnels & GHL

Build and edit landing pages, forms, popups, and thank-you pages in GHL

Set up tags, pipelines, triggers, and workflows

Implement and test automations 
/SMS, follow-ups, reminders)

 & Automations

Set up
 campaigns and sequences from provided copy

Segment lists, apply tags, and ensure correct audiences receive the right flows

Test links, formatting, and deliverability before sending

Website & Assets

Make simple page updates (copy, images, sections) on our website

Coordinate with designers / developers for larger changes

Help maintain consistency between funnels and site (branding, flow, offers)

General Marketing Support

Document processes and keep SOPs up to date

Do basic reporting (screenshots, simple spreadsheets, GHL stats)

Support launches, events, and promos with implementation tasks



You’ll Be a Great Fit If…



You have experience with GoHighLevel (or similar tools like ClickFunnels, Kartra, etc., and are willing to learn GHL fast)

You’ve built landing pages and basic automations before

You’re comfortable setting up
 campaigns and sequences

You have an eye for clean, simple design (you don’t need to be a pro designer)

Your written English is strong and you’re detail oriented

You like checklists, organisation, and “doing the work” that makes campaigns run



How We Work (Our Values)



Impact First: We focus on client results, not vanity metrics or fake busyness.

World Class Standard: We move quickly but don’t ship sloppy work.

Pursuit of Mastery: We assume version 1 is wrong and keep improving.

Own the Outcome: If it’s yours, you drive it. No excuses.

Truth with Respect: We communicate directly and kindly; no drama or gossip.

Good Humans, Great Energy: We work hard, have fun, and support each other.



If this sounds like you, you’ll love working with us.



Role Details & How to Apply

Hours: 20–30 hours per week (with potential to grow)

Type: Contractor / long-term VA

Compensation: Competitive based on experience



To apply, please send:

- Your CV or profile link

- Links/screenshots to 2–3 funnels or pages you’ve built (GHL or similar)

- A short 3 minute video answering the below:

Who you are and why you're applying for this role

Your experience with GoHighLevel or similar tools

One example of an automation or
 flow you’ve set up



 
 with the Subject line: “Marketing & Funnel Assistant – [Your Name]” And include all of the above.

title: Google Ads and Meta ads Specialist (Part-Time, 40 Hours/Month)
description:
Google Ads & Meta Ads Specialist (Part-Time | Remote)

About Us

We are a UK-based digital marketing agency, not limited to a specific industry. 

We focus on results. 

We are looking for a reliable, experienced ads specialist who can take ownership of campaign setup, optimisation, reporting and tracking.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for setting up, managing and improving Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns across multiple client accounts.

This is a hands-on execution role with the opportunity to grow into more responsibility over time.

Hours & Pay

~40 hours per month

Starting May 2026

$10/hour (with opportunity to increase based on performance)





Core Responsibilities:

Google Ads-



Set up and manage campaigns (Search, Display, shopping, Performance Max)

Keyword research and negative keyword optimisation

Write and test ad copy.

Manage bidding strategies

Improve CTR, CPC, and conversions.





Meta Ads-



Set up campaigns

Build audiences (cold, lookalike, retargeting)

Run A/B tests (creative, copy, audiences)

Scale campaigns based on performance





Tracking & Setup-

Google Tag Manager

Meta Pixel setup and event tracking

GA4 tracking and validation

Troubleshoot tracking issues





Optimisation-

Ongoing performance improvements

Identify underperforming campaigns and fix them.

Suggest improvements (not just follow instructions)





Requirements

Minimum 3 years of experience in:

Google Ads

Meta Ads

Strong experience with Google Tag Manager

Experience setting up conversion tracking correctly

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Good written English





Nice to Have (Bonus)

Comfortable speaking with clients (Loom or messages)

Experience with: Smaller budgets

CRO / landing page feedback







How We Work-

Clear tasks and expectations

Focus on results

No micromanagement, but accountability matters

Communication via WhatsApp

Occasional Google Meets for updates and catch-ups. 





To Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, you MUST include:



Your experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads



Screenshots or examples of campaigns you have worked on



A short Loom video (2–3 mins):

“What would you do first to improve a poorly performing Google Ads campaign?” Please send these to 



Confirm your availability starting in May.



What is your favourite film and why do you like it? 



Dont use AI to apply. As an agency, we use AI in day-to-day operations. If you are interested in this position, I would prefer that you apply personally. 





Applications without these will not be considered.

title: Outbound Customer Service Representative- High Ticket Sales- USA
description:
Description:

Are you a rockstar closer who consistently hits targets and wants more? Join our US-based e-commerce brand in beauty and wellness and be part of a winning, high-performing sales team. This is a performance-based role with warm leads, high-ticket sales, and uncapped commissions.



What You’ll Do:

Follow up with warm inbound leads and past visitors

Convert inquiries and trial users into paying customers and subscriptions

Guide buyers through product and subscription options

Maintain accurate performance records



Why Top Closers Join Us:

600 Base pay so that you can adjust (commissions are always above 4000 USD)

Unlimited Commissions: $6,000–$10,000+/month based on performance

High-Caliber Leads: Warm, pre-qualified prospects only – no cold calling

Winning Team: Work alongside other elite closers in a results-driven, growth-focused environment

Career Growth: Opportunities to expand your skills, influence, and leadership potential



Ideal Candidate:

Proven experience in remote sales, telesales, or performance-based roles

Self-motivated, disciplined, and results-driven

Available for consistent evening hours (PH time)

Thrives on closing high-value deals and being part of a top-performing team

title: PHP Developer
description:
We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented PHP Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing web applications, ensuring high performance, responsiveness, and security. You will work closely with designers, front-end developers, and other stakeholders to deliver scalable and user-friendly solutions.

thodologies

title: Packaging & Label Designer
description:
We are looking for an experienced label and packaging designer to create premium, clean, and conversion-focused designs for our product line.



The goal is not just to make the product look good, but to make it stand out on the shelf and online, while clearly communicating quality, trust, and brand identity.



Scope of Work:



Design product labels (front + back)

Create full packaging concepts (bottles, jars, boxes, pouches)

Ensure designs are print-ready and aligned with manufacturer requirements

Maintain consistent branding across all products



Design Style:



Clean, modern, premium look

Strong focus on readability and hierarchy

Minimal but impactful (no clutter)

Optimized for e-commerce (must look great on Shopify product pages)



Requirements:



Experience with supplement or wellness products (preferred)

Understanding of label compliance (FDA-style structure, supplement facts layout, etc.)

Ability to deliver print-ready files (AI, PDF, SVG)

Knowledge of packaging dimensions, bleed, and print specs



What We Provide:



Brand direction and references

Product details (ingredients, benefits, positioning)

Examples of styles we like



What We Expect:



2–3 initial concepts per product

Revisions based on feedback

Final files ready for production



Goal:

Create packaging that increases perceived value and improves conversion rate on product pages.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer (Expert Level)
description:
YouTube Thumbnail Designer (Expert Level)



About the role

We're a content agency that specialises in helping businesses sign clients from their content. We produce YouTube content at a consistent cadence and need a skilled thumbnail designer who understands what gets clicks in the business and coaching space.



Important: Our content is for professional business audiences — think Alex Hormozi, Codie Sanchez, Dan Martell. Clean, authoritative, and high-trust. We are not looking for the high-energy, neon, reaction-face style associated with entertainment or gaming channels.



Pay

$15 – $30 per thumbnail set (3 options). Rate based on experience and quality of portfolio.



What you'll do



Design click-optimised thumbnails for YouTube videos across multiple client channels in the business, coaching, and finance niche



Follow brand guidelines per client (fonts, colours, tone) while applying proven CTR principles suited to professional audiences

Deliver 2–3 thumbnail options per video for A/B testing



Work from a content brief, video title, and raw footage screenshots or provided images



Turnaround per thumbnail set: 24 hours or less





Requirements:



Strong portfolio of YouTube thumbnails — must show real-world examples from business, coaching, finance, or similar professional niches



Expert-level Photoshop — clean cutouts, precise text hierarchy, strong composition



Understanding of what drives clicks in a professional context — contrast, authority, curiosity gaps, and clean bold typography (not shock value or exaggerated expressions)



Reliable, communicative, and able to work independently with minimal back-and-forth



Experience working with personal brands in the business or coaching space (preferred)





Nice to have



Familiarity with channels like Alex Hormozi, Codie Sanchez, Dan Martell — you know what that aesthetic looks and feels like

Able to do basic image sourcing and background removal without needing to be briefed on every asset

Experience with A/B testing thumbnails and understanding basic YouTube analytics





How to apply

Send your application with the following:



A link to your thumbnail portfolio or 5+ examples — ideally from business or professional content channels

Your typical turnaround time and current availability

One sentence on what makes a thumbnail work for a business audience specifically



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. If your portfolio is primarily entertainment, gaming, or reaction-style content, this role is not the right fit.



To show you have read this job post in full, please start your application with the word: Fusiondesign

title: Call Sales & Booking Agents for UK
description:
Are you the kind of person who can take a “How much?” call and turn it into a confirmed booking?

If your strongest skill is closing a sale, we want you on our team.



We’re a UK-based home improvement company serving customers across London, hiring full-time remote Sales & Booking Agents. Your main goal is simple: convert enquiries into booked jobs quickly, accurately, and professionally.



Important: Start your application with the word london



What success looks like in this role:

You confidently guide calls/messages to a clear outcome: booking confirmed

You gather the right details fast, give accurate quotes, and handle objections calmly

You follow up leads until they’re either booked or closed off properly

Your day-to-day

Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

Ask the right questions to qualify the job (postcode, items, access/floors, lift/stairs, parking, timing)

Provide quotes using our pricing rules and guidelines

Convert enquiries into confirmed bookings (this is the priority)

Follow up missed calls, warm leads, and open enquiries

Update notes and booking records clearly and accurately



What we’re looking for: 

2 to 3+ years call centre experience

Strong sales/closing/booking background (telesales, inbound sales, service booking, upsell)

Confident objection handling and a results-focused mindset

Excellent spoken and written English with a clear phone manner

Reliable attendance and consistency (this matters)

Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment

Remote setup required

Stable internet connection



Working schedule (UK business hours): 

10 hours per day

6 days per week

Night shift in the Philippines (aligned to UK time)

Training



You’ll receive training on our services, pricing structure, quoting process, and booking workflow.



How to apply:

Please send:

Your updated CV/resume

A short 1 to 2 paragraph introduction explaining your sales + booking/closing experience

Add a link to a short voice recording or intro video
